 Small but mighty, our bayside cafe was recently crowned Victoria’s Best by the Good Food Guide. Delivering quality brews and tasty bites by day, then smashable wines and share plates after sundown, all with seriously good vibes for the fine folk of Frankston.
 
 
 
 Menu
 
 View menu
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 About
 
 Commonfolk are Frankston locals, born and bred. So when the chance came to open our dream space in the neighbourhood, we made our choice and backed Frankston.Our home on Playne Street is our way of saying thanks. A chance to build an all-day meeting place. Join us for breakfast, coffee, lunch, or something in between, then settle in after sundown for smashable wines and share plates.The kitchen finally has the room it needs to do our menu justice. And of course, we are still pouring some of the best brews in Bayside, and you can explore our entire coffee range to take a little bit of Commonfolk home with you.This is a bit of a love letter to Frankston. A thank you. A fresh start. A chance to show what we can do with just a bit more room to move. We hope you like it.

As with all of our venues, 20c from every cup of coffee brewed and every kilo of coffee roasted is donated to The Cup That Counts, an initiative dedicated to creating a fairer and tastier coffee industry for everyone involved. Find out more.
 
 

 
 
 Evenings
 
 As the sun goes down the space shifts into a relaxed neighbourhood wine bar. With a focus on produce-driven food and honest winemaking, it's a little bit Euro wine bar and a whole heap of OG Franga. Expect a rotating list of thoughtful, small-producer wines, a tight menu of share plates designed for easy grazing, and the same warm Commonfolk hospitality, just with the lights a little lower and the music a little warmer.

mcclelland-gallery-caf-langwarrin:
Harry's Cafe Food MenuDrink MenuGroup Menu Wednesday – Friday: 10am – 4pmSaturday & Sunday: 9am – 4pm
Click here to book your table
For groups over 12 people please call the cafe. Credit card details will be required to hold your booking.
For further enquiries Email us: cafe@mcclelland.org.auPhone us: 03 9789 1671 | extension 2
Entry fee waived for cafe dining bookings made in advance. Harry’s Cafe is a relaxed cafe overlooking McClelland’s beautiful bushland and is surrounded by the outdoor collection of modern Australian sculptures.
Our food and beverage offering has been crafted to celebrate the wonderful produce of this region and showcase some of the clever producers of the Mornington Peninsula. You can select from a considered range of local wines and beers to enjoy before or after your walk through the park.
You can book a table and dine in Harry’s Cafe for Breakfast or Lunch.Kitchen meals are available from 10am to 3pm.Please note: Dogs are welcome at McClelland when accompanied at all times. If you’re dining with your dog, we offer limited outdoor seating, where dogs must remain on a leash. Water bowls are available to keep your pup hydrated after a stroll through the Sculpture Park. Kid’s Parties at Harry’s Cafe.
Let their imagination take flight with art play in nature. Come meet our gentle giant Frankie, the iconic chrome gnome! Savour delicious family friendly food with our specially crafted kid's boxes at Harry’s Cafe followed by creative exploration.Book a McClelland Kid’s Party at Harry’s Cafe today.
the-laughing-lark-cafe-frankston:
The Laughing Lark Cafe1/16 Clyde Street Mall, FrankstonLocally owned and licensed cafe on the Mornington Peninsula. Open 7am - 3pm Monday - Friday and 8am - 3pm weekends.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 View Menu
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 BOOK A TABLE
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 Something to lark about.Located in Frankston, Victoria, The Laughing Lark Cafe was established with the common goal of combining good coffee and simple, delicious food in a relaxed, family-friendly environment, right here within the beautiful Mornington Peninsula.The team at The Laughing Lark believe that simple does not need to be ordinary. We boast an extensive menu that caters to everybody. No frills are required when the food is this good! Whether its a casual breakfast to start your day, a catch-up over brunch or lunch with colleagues, The Laughing Lark Cafe is fully licensed and the perfect place to immerse yourself.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 Get Directions
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 The MenuSimple, done well. Fresh and nourishing home-cooked foods.Indulge in our delicious seasonal meals and all-day breakfast options, or pick from the ready-to-eat display fridges packed to the brim with sweet and savoury treats. Our ingredients are fresh, delicious, and of the highest quality to ensure maximum nutrition and flavour. Our extensive menu caters to everybody. Even the kids are spoilt for choice! We are also licensed from 11 am daily.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 View Menu

 RecommendedWe are pleased to announce that we’ve been awarded a Recommendation badge by Restaurant Guru, one of the world’s most popular foodie websites with over 30 millions monthly users.

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Take us on the road.The Laughing Lark Mobile Cafe is open with two locations. You can find us on weekday mornings in Mount Eliza and 7 days a week in Frankston. We are also available for your next event or function!

FlavoursExplore MenuOur StoryBrewing HappinessWelcome to 18-EightyEight, your go-to espresso bar and cafe in Seaford, VIC. williams-road-cafe-dandenong-south:
Williams Road Cafe, Dandenong South
 We are a family owned cafe on Williams Road, serving the local community for over 10 years. Drop in for great coffee, breakfast favourites, hot meals, fresh sandwiches, salads, and a few sweet treats.
 What we serve
 Our menu includes toasted sandwiches, daily specials, and classic cafe favourites. We keep a mix of healthier options and comfort food, so there is something for everyone.
 Coffee and breakfast
 Whether you are grabbing a takeaway coffee or sitting down for breakfast, we focus on friendly service and consistent quality.
 Visit us
 Find us at 4 Deans Ct, Dandenong South VIC 3175. Open early at 5am. Call (03) 9706 9580 to order ahead.
 Opening Hours
 Monday to Friday: 5:00am to 3:00pm. Closed weekends and public holidays.

Menu© TapNOrderSuburban CafeYour Safe Haven.ORDER ONLINEBook NowDiscoverWho We AreAt The Suburban Cafe, located right here in Dandenong South, we believe that great food and exceptional coffee are the cornerstones of a truly memorable day. We founded our cafe with a simple vision: to create a warm, inviting space where our community can gather, relax, and savor delicious moments.

Every dish we serve is crafted with passion, using quality ingredients to bring you a menu that's both comforting and exciting. From our highly-praised, velvety smooth coffee to our generous breakfast spreads and hearty lunch options, we pour our heart into everything we do.

We're more than just a place to eat; we're a place to connect. Whether you're grabbing a quick takeaway, enjoying a leisurely brunch with family, or catching up with friends, you'll find a friendly face and a welcoming atmosphere waiting for you at The Suburban Cafe. Come on in and become a part of our story!Learn moreDiscoverOur ServicesDine-In ExperienceStep into our warm and inviting space, perfect for a relaxed breakfast, a vibrant brunch, or a satisfying lunch. Enjoy our cozy atmosphere, attentive service, and, of course, our highly praised food and coffeeConvenient TakeawayIn a hurry? Grab your favourite coffee, a freshly prepared meal, or a sweet treat to go. Our full menu is available for takeaway, making it easy to enjoy The Suburban Cafe wherever you are.Online Ordering & DeliveryFor ultimate convenience, you can now order your Suburban Cafe favourites from the comfort of your home or office directly through our website. We're excited to bring our delicious menu straight to your door!Exceptional Coffee & BeveragesOur baristas craft every coffee with passion, serving up Dandenong South's best and smoothest brews. Explore our range of espresso drinks, iced coffees, refreshing smoothies, and more.Catering & EventsMake your next event effortlessly delicious with our dedicated catering service. OUR MENU
We’re immensely proud of our menu and our chef, who uses the most seasonal produce available to serve up a wide range of beautifully plated and very tasty food. The menu changes regularly, so expect some delicious Winter dishes in the coming months alongside year-round classics like our signature steak sandwich, and our fries with whipped mustard mayo. We also have kids meals for the under 12s, some wonderfully indulgent home made cakes and desserts, a small but discerning wine list, and a daily specials board for those looking to try something new.

The Rise Pizzeria Cafe is a family-run business serving brunch favourites by day and sharing our Italian heritage with the community by night.

We focus on premium, fresh ingredients to create authentic Italian dishes, including our Roman-style wood-fired pizza.

our-little-ray-of-sunshine-sandringham:
OUR LITTLE RAY OF SUNSHINE
 
 
 
 *
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 OUR LITTLE RAY OF SUNSHINE

 OUR LITTLE RAY OF SUNSHINE * 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 ABOUT US
 
 
 
 *
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 ABOUT US
 
 *
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 ABOUT US * 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 Just 150 meters from Sandringham Beach, Our Little Ray of Sunshine Café is a cheerful spot that radiates casual charm. Known for speedy coffee, comforting food, and a playful, family-friendly vibe, it has become a true neighbourhood favourite.This café is a place where everyone—from early morning regulars to families with kids—can find something special.The menu is thoughtfully crafted, featuring hearty breakfasts, fresh brunch options, and delightful treats that keep everyone smiling. With a dedicated kids’ menu and a cosy play corner, it’s a welcoming haven for families.At Our Little Ray, community is at the heart of everything we do. It’s the kind of place where the staff know your name, and friendly service and genuine connections make you feel right at home. Whether you’re popping in for a quick coffee or settling in for a leisurely brunch, you’ll find a relaxed, down-to-earth atmosphere.

little-z-bentleigh:
Our MenuIn late October 2022, Little Z opened its doors on Patterson Road, Bentleigh. Welcoming the vibrant community of Glen Eira. Our mission was simple: to craft a cozy haven where the warmth and joy of gathering with friends, sharing delicious food, or relaxing with a great book over a perfectly brewed coffee could come to life. At Little Z, our menu is all about heart and happiness — from enticing breakfast bites and comforting lunches to decadent treats and specialty coffees. It’s not just about the food; it’s about creating a space where you can unwind, connect, and indulge in moments of pure joy. Come in, cozy up, and experience the comfort and community that makes Little Z the perfect spot to enjoy good company and great flavors.

Saturday : 8.00am - 3pmYour local neighbourhood cafe inHoppers CrossingWelcome to Jock & Mack, a modern Australian cafe serving breakfast, brunch and lunch all day. 

Ours is a space to relax, catch up with friends, share meaningful conversations, get a friendly smile & conversation with our staff, make memories, feed your Instagram, and get that coffee & food fix that won't obtain in your own kitchen. 

We offer the breakfast classics that we all know and love, hello eggs benedict, but always with a twist. Our food is unpretentious, mostly comfort eating, saucy, house made deliciousness. 

If you have a sweet tooth we have all the cakes, slices, donuts, cinnamon scrolls, biscuits, brownies that are the things of your dreams. 

We offer Melbourne roaster - Axil Coffee. The coffee is delicious and we also offer the beans for you to take home too!

 The Combi story started in Byron Bay, New South Wales with simple toasties and coffee being sold out of an actual Volkswagen combi van. Fast-forward a few years and over 1500 kilometres and Combi now serves as a pillar of health, wellbeing, and spirituality in the Elwood community. 

 

 

 
 All coffee sold at Combi Elwood is 100% organic and certified fair trade.

Breakfast Restaurant in Brighton

Little Sister Brighton – where delicious breakfast meets wholesome vegetarian and vegan options. Your cosy corner in Brighton awaits. Give us a call today on
 (03) 9326 1115 

Delicious Breakfast Classics

At Little Sister Brighton, breakfast is more than a meal – it's an experience. Indulge in our hearty classics like crispy waffles, savoury omelets, and crispy bacon. Every dish is prepared with care and served with a smile. Whether you're craving something sweet or savoury, our menu offers a variety of options to satisfy every palate.
Pair your meal with a freshly brewed coffee or a refreshing juice for the perfect start to your day. Join us and discover why we're known for serving the best breakfast in town.

 A Boutique with a Touch of Charm ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ They asked for a review and of course I said yes!!!
Such a beautiful cafe and flower/gift shop. Some very cute gifts at decent prices.
I have coffee here regularly and it's always good. Today I had the caramel slice too and it was yummy.
They don't always have much gluten free options but they are fairly new, I'm sure once they get busier they'll be able to stock more of the alternative stuff.
In terms of the gift shop, I bought one of their scrunchies a few months back and it's quality and going strong. I just bought a bear candle as a gift. Very reasonably priced and really nice scent.
And the service! Staff here are so friendly and accommodating. It's always lovely to be greeted with such a welcoming attitude and service.

 landed Australia in 2019, the first store was opened on

 formed a long line of over 300 meters. machi fans and milk

 tea lovers all gather together to celebrate the grand

 opening as well as have a sip of their favorite milk tea

 even though the average waiting time is more than an hour,

 it was worth it.

gloria-jeans-wheelers-hill:
Summer is all about sunshine, good company, and delicious food. Whether you’re hosting a backyard barbecue, a picnic in the park, or a casual get-together with friends, keeping your menu simple and fresh makes entertaining easy and fun. Here are five crowd-pleasing ideas that capture the best flavours of summer.
1. Grazing Boards
A colourful grazing board is always a winner. Mix seasonal fruits like watermelon, berries, and grapes with cheeses, cured meats, olives, dips, and crusty bread. It’s easy to put together, looks impressive, and allows everyone to pick and choose what they like.
2. Fresh Salad Bowls
Skip the heavy meals and serve vibrant salads that double as main dishes. Try a Greek salad with feta and olives, a grilled chicken and mango salad, or a quinoa and roasted veggie option. Drizzle with a zesty dressing for extra flavour.
3. Skewers and BBQ Bites
Grilled skewers are perfect for outdoor entertaining. Thread your choice of meat, seafood, or veggies onto skewers and cook them on the barbecue. Think honey-soy chicken, prawn and pineapple, or halloumi and capsicum for a vegetarian option.
4. Build-Your-Own Tacos
Set up a taco bar for a fun, hands-on meal. Provide soft and hard taco shells, a variety of fillings like pulled pork, grilled fish, or black beans, and toppings such as salsa, guacamole, and slaw. Everyone can create their own perfect combo.
5. Chilled Desserts
Finish on a refreshing note with something cool and light. Serve fruit skewers, mini pavlovas with fresh berries, or homemade ice cream sandwiches for a sweet summer treat.
With these easy food ideas, your summer get-togethers will be stress-free, delicious, and full of flavour!

The multi award winning Montania is open for breakfast, lunch and dinner 7 days a week, offering casual A’la carte dining at it’s best. Nestled right on the edge of the Dandenong Ranges with great atmosphere and a reputation for amazing food, service and coffee.

Offering three dining areas to choose from, including a large alfresco terrace with ample free parking. Our Chef brings to the table an extensive menu with a twist on classic Italian, complimented by a fully licensed bar, showcasing our local wineries in the Yarra Valley, accompanied with a range of local and international tap beer and cider. Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner

The railway was originally one of four gauge lines in Victoria, built to open up remote areas at the turn of the century. It runs through the southern foothills of the Dandenong Ranges up to Gembrook. The century old steam train now serves as a popular tourist attraction, only 40kms out of Melbourne city. The Puffing Billy Railway is kept in operation through the efforts of volunteers of the Puffing Billy Preservation Society, although intensive year-round operations have led to a few dozen paid employees to keep things going behind the scenes. The railway aims to preserve and restore the line as near as possible to how it was in the first three decades of its existence, but with particular emphasis on the early 1920s.

 Monarch Cakes 2008 - 2014
 All rights reserved

 Jane Skingle Photography
 0416 197 527
 
 
 
 
 ST KILDA’S FINEST CAKE SHOP
 
 
 Monarch Cakes has been baking from the same recipes for over 80 years. Many of the recipes originated from the original shop in Poland and were brought to Australia and have been used here ever since. In the past, a cake was made from fresh, raw ingredients such as butter, flour, eggs, and sugar. Today many have sacrificed that old fashioned flavour in order to bake more quickly and cheaply. At Monarch Cakes we would never dream of doing that! 
 We bake the same way our grandmothers did, using the ingredients in their most natural form. Our cakes are made with the highest grade butter and sugar and we never use substitutes or premixes. This is evident in the way the cakes taste.
 Most of the recipes come from Eastern Europe: Austria, Poland, Germany, Hungary, Slovakia, and a few more recent editions from the French. 
  
 
 
 
 
 Our Polish Cheesecake has been made the same way since the early 1920’s, and is recommended in a top Asian travel guide as one of the four best things to experience in Melbourne! 
 Monarch’s famous Chocolate Kooglhoupf might be unpronounceable to some, but it’s certainly loved by all who taste it. The counter tray of Chocolate Kooglhoupf has developed cult status as it is devoured daily by a following of trendy St Kilda locals.
 We at Monarch hope you enjoy our website and would love for you to drop in for a cake and coffee. Remember you can always order cake online too!
 
 
 
 
 MONARCH’S FAMOUS CAKES
 
 
 CHOCOLATE Kooglhoupf
 One of the most delightfully addictive cakes you will ever try. It is made from yeast pastry and has soft melted chocolate swirled through the cake. It looks like a marble cake, but instead of cocoa through the cake, we use real chocolate! It comes in the round shape either small feeding 1-2, medium 6-8 or large for 12-16. It is also available in a slab form where you can come in and have it by the slice with a coffee, or by the whole slab to cater for 30+. It has been featured in numerous articles and programs and is sent to people be mail order all over Australia! For those who are not chocolate lovers, try the poppyseed variety. 
 
 
 
 100 YEAR OLD POLISH 
 BAKED CHEESE CAKE
 Our Polish Baked Cheesecake is made to a 100 year old recipe, using the finest and freshest ingredients. It is made with Gippsland cottage cheese which is smooth and creamy. It is fully baked and for many this is a taste of home. Our European clientele believe it is the way cheese cake is supposed to taste!
 
 
 
 MONARCH'S F
al-naturale-st-kilda:
Close

 
 
 

About our FounderMarialuisa arrived in Australia in 2013, bringing with her the essence of Monopoli, a charming town in Puglia, Italy. In Monopoli, life revolves around freshness and simplicity, and Marialuisa's deep passion for food reflects this.

 

Believing that food is intimately tied to our happiness, she sought an almond milk that truly captures the true taste of almonds but found none that met her standards. 

This is how her journey began. Creating an Almond milk with 20% of activated almonds which is the highest percentage of nuts in Australia. Customer reviewsOur MissionOur mission at Al Naturale is to offer you premium, authentic nut milks, crafted to perfection and free from any additives or preservatives. We are passionate about transparency and purity, ensuring every bottle holds the genuine taste of nature. 

 

Dedicated to supporting local, we work hand-in-hand with trusted suppliers, constantly seeking out the finest quality ingredients to bring you the very best. With every sip, you’re not only enjoying a delicious, clean beverage, but also supporting a commitment to sustainability and exceptional qualityOur MenuWhere to BuyOur Secret RecipeA generous blend of high quality activated nuts,  filtered water, sweetened with a date, a touch of salt, and love. Crafted with the utmost care, each sip is a pure delight, delivering the natural richness of activated nuts blended seamlessly with pure, filtered water.

 

Sweetened ever so slightly with a single date, this drink is a perfect balance of flavor and nourishment. The gentle touch of salt accentuates the wholesome taste, and each bottle is infused with love to ensure a refreshing experience you’ll savor to the last drop. einstein-251-caulfield-north:
Einstein's 251 Cafe
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

  NEW 2026 MENU
 

 

 

 
 
 About our cafe:
Einstein’s 251 celebrates Albert Einstein and his Jewish heritage, in cafe form. Set in the heart of Caulfield North, the eatery honours the genius by serving clever food, merging Melbourne-style breakfast and brunch with Middle Eastern food.
Take a look at our new menu: there are a few new dishes and our old classics which everyone loves.
Fusion dishes include halloumi breakfast and shakshuka. Ingredients include pomegranate, za’atar, dukkah and tahini, splashed throughout the menu to emphasise the liveliness of Middle Eastern food. A funky fit-out of exposed brick, high stools and comfortable tables plus gentle lighting allows you to fully immerse in our food and beverages.
A Sanremo machine paired with Grinders roasters provides luxurious and tasty coffee and fresh Chai. You can sip away in the courtyard with friends, or enjoy takeaway.
WE HOPE TO SEE YOU SOON!

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 WHAT'S ON OUR NEW MENU
 
 

 
 
 Imaginative brekkies, sandwiches & smoothies
served in a little cafe with a relaxed vibe.

pardon-coffee-prahran:
OUR COFFEEAt Pardon we take our coffee seriously, and we know you do too. That's why we choose Undercover Roaster's Signature BLK blend as our house blend.Consisting of 50% Colombian, 25% Ethiopian and 25% Guatemalan beans, this blend gives a clean, sweet and well balanced cherry acidity. With its notes of honey, nougat, almonds and dark cocoa, this blend will keep you coming back day after day.CoffeeOUR FOODAt Pardon we offer a range of different tasty treats, perfectly matched to your mood.Whether you're after a nice nourishing breakfast or lunch or just a cheeky afternoon snack with your coffee, our selection of sandwiches, croissants, bagels, wraps, cakes and sweets will be sure to hit the spot.Come and enjoy the Pardon vibe with seating indoors or out in the sunshine, or grab your lunch on the run with our new online ordering system and spread the word about the best cafe in Prahran!VIEW OUR MENUFoodGalleyWHY PARDON?At Pardon we like to get to know our customers just as we like them to get to know us.

Our ambience, just like our coffee, is all about warmth and friendliness - creating a cosy environment where you can come and relax, read our selection of books, chat with your friends and know you’ll be well looked after by our amazing staff. We look forward to having you!FIND USGet to know PardonFOLLOW US@pardoncoffeeContact

machimachi

 landed Australia in 2019, the first store was opened on

 George Street at the heart of Sydney in October. The grand

 opening had attracted a incredible amount of guests which

 formed a long line of over 300 meters. machi fans and milk

 tea lovers all gather together to celebrate the grand

 opening as well as have a sip of their favorite milk tea

 even though the average waiting time is more than an hour,

 it was worth it.

 focusing on original, innovation and high

 quality, machimachi’s leading edge

 inventions and processes are not replicable.

 Our cream cheese foam is one of the most popular

 picks while the bottled milk tea is the only

 kind among the industry.

 machimachi is also the original inventor of

 Black Milk Tea with Crème Brulee.

 “machi” really means “much”,

CateringWe love to cater! We cater for all occasions; from family dinners to birthdays, anniversaries, work or corporate functions big and small, funerals and much more. Whether you are catering for a small group or for a large gathering, we offer a broad range of products suitable for most celebrations. You can locate our menu in the products tab or contact us by enquiring below.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 Enquire here
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 ProductsFrom cakes to pies, to salads to our award winning sourdough bread; there is a little something for everyone at Clancy’s. We pride ourselves on producing only the best quality food and source locally wherever possible to ensure we keep supporting small businesses. We also cater to our four legged friends too by offering high quality, gourmet treats from K9 Katering. 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 menu
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 Our CoffeeWe partner with Ottimo Coffee, a local specialty coffee roaster dedicated to roasting, brewing and providing the best in coffee and tea to businesses around Australia since 2007. Our in house blend is the Malvern Blend which has become a staple in the East Malvern community.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 Learn more
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 We are a small, family-owned Bakehouse nestled in the heart of East Malvern. For more than 20 years, we have proudly served the local community and neighboring suburbs with our fresh, delicious baked goods.

 

 

 
 About Us

acre-eatery-burwood-east:
Summer is all about sunshine, good company, and delicious food. Whether you’re hosting a backyard barbecue, a picnic in the park, or a casual get-together with friends, keeping your menu simple and fresh makes entertaining easy and fun. Here are five crowd-pleasing ideas that capture the best flavours of summer.
1. Grazing Boards
A colourful grazing board is always a winner. Mix seasonal fruits like watermelon, berries, and grapes with cheeses, cured meats, olives, dips, and crusty bread. It’s easy to put together, looks impressive, and allows everyone to pick and choose what they like.
2. Fresh Salad Bowls
Skip the heavy meals and serve vibrant salads that double as main dishes. Try a Greek salad with feta and olives, a grilled chicken and mango salad, or a quinoa and roasted veggie option. Drizzle with a zesty dressing for extra flavour.
3. Skewers and BBQ Bites
Grilled skewers are perfect for outdoor entertaining. Thread your choice of meat, seafood, or veggies onto skewers and cook them on the barbecue. Think honey-soy chicken, prawn and pineapple, or halloumi and capsicum for a vegetarian option.
4. Build-Your-Own Tacos
Set up a taco bar for a fun, hands-on meal. Provide soft and hard taco shells, a variety of fillings like pulled pork, grilled fish, or black beans, and toppings such as salsa, guacamole, and slaw. Everyone can create their own perfect combo.
5. Chilled Desserts
Finish on a refreshing note with something cool and light. Serve fruit skewers, mini pavlovas with fresh berries, or homemade ice cream sandwiches for a sweet summer treat.
With these easy food ideas, your summer get-togethers will be stress-free, delicious, and full of flavour!

Designed to be your go-to daily spot, we offer a relaxed atmosphere, quality-driven menu, and consistently great service.Our StoryAt Eugenes, we’re a locally owned and operated café built on a deep love for quality, community, and genuine hospitality. Nestled in the heart of Wantirna, we’re all about offering a premium yet casual experience that feels both elevated and familiar.

We believe in the beauty of simplicity—doing the basics not just well, but exceptionally well. Our seasonal menu is designed to strike the perfect balance between creativity and comfort, with dishes that feel both thoughtful and approachable. Whether you're grabbing a quick weekday bite, enjoying a slow brunch, or catching up with friends over lunch, Eugenes is a space where good food, relaxed energy, and great service come together effortlessly.Visit UsGet in TouchFor inquiries or reservations, reach out to us. miss-anam-seddon: Miss An’amMenuDelicious and healthy Vietnamese cuisine Good Vietnamese food is all about the brilliant balance of flavours – the sweet and the savoury, the cooling and the warming, the fresh and the fermented – and that’s what we’re all about!Our food is influenced by our owner, Laura’s, Northern Vietnamese upbringing in Hanoi, where the food has a much stronger French influence and is saltier, as opposed to the sweeter food of the South.We’d love you to try our light lunch of made-to-order rice paper rolls, banh mi piled high with fresh fillings or scrumptious sushi. Or indulge in a soul-satisfying bowl of homemade pho, traditional beef stew or crispy Vietnamese salads.Our menu is healthy and fresh and easily adapted to cater for vegetarians, vegans and allergies. lola-seddon:
Lola Cafe SeddonQuality Family Meals, With the Best Views at Lola Cafe SeddonLola Café Seddon has a deep history, a rather funky history – as interesting as the founder, Beatriz Fernandez. More affectionately known as Mama Bear. Beatriz, a native Portuguese with a heart for people and for cooking, explored alternative avenues after closing down the CBD café Lorca. Lola was born, named after Beatriz’s favourite flamingo dancer. Armed with a vision and a great sense of direction for the new space, the community-driven, family-focused environment was created to serve both kids and parents. A warm, safe and friendly manner provides a secure area for the kids to play while mum and dad enjoy their meal.
 
Our Spanish café menu boasts a wide selection of breakfasts, seafood dishes, meat and vegetarian dishes, for sit-down or takeaway, we provide something for everyone. We serve a variety of classics like Spanish vegetarian pisto, smashed avocado and Lisbon breakfast with black pudding, to name but a few. Our freshly-baked delicacies are a mouth-watering experience – everything is worth a try.About usBeatriz Fernandez, or “Mama Bea” as she’s affectionately called, named Lola after her favorite flamenco dancer, whose imperious portrait dominates the otherwise muted interior. 

The Portuguese native started this inner-west Spanish Portuguese venue after selling her CBD café Lorca. We loved the area’s friendly, family-focused community.

Lola has a kid's menu and activities corner to keep the kids occupied while parents relax with a morning coffee.

 

The menu has a fairly even spread of vegetarian, seafood and other meat dishes.

On the breakfast menu are classics such as Birches Muesli, - Spanish Pancake - Mushroom Deluxe - Smashed Avocado & Halloumi- Spanish Corn Fritters - Lisbon Breakfast - Barcelona Egg Benedict - Free Range Eggs your way - Green Eggs - Chilli Scrambled as well as a selection of baked goods. 

There’s also a range of freshly squeezed juices and smoothies. 

The extensive lunch menus include dishes such as Mushroom & Blue Cheese Croquettes, Squids ink Croquettes, Reuben Sandwich, Paella, Mediterranean Lamb Salad, Under the Sea …

To drink, choose from a selection of beer and wine both local and imported from Portugal and Spain and house-made sangriaDine-in or takeaway at our Retro- Industrial chic cafe. Indulge your sences with Spanish and Portuguese classic dishes and Mebourne great coffeeTry Our Cafe
 
 
 

Our Menu
 
 
 

THE BEST COFFEE SHOP IN SEDDON

We're one of the best located café in the heart of Seddon! From Lola the whole of Seddon in your view. Whether you need a cosy spot to enjoy a coffee and brunch on your own or with friends or you're looking to host a large family or business event, Lola café have you covered. Book a table today to see what makes us your best local choice for food and coffee in Seddon.Our ReviewsWe are proud of our café. We want you to love it as much as we do.  Hey Sinners, Discover the Charm of 
 
 
 
 Seddon Deadly Sins Cafe 
 
 
 
 Nestled in the heart of inner-west Melbourne, Seddon Deadly Sins is more than just a café; it’s a community hub where locals gather for delicious food, quality coffee, and indulgent treats. Since 2003, we’ve been serving smiles and creating memorable experiences with our unique blend of country warmth and urban flair.Seddon may have changed a lot over recent years, but the good old-fashioned service with a smile that the locals have come to love about Seddon Deadly Sins, remains just the same. Started in 2003, Chris couldn’t be happier to have stumbled across such a special little pocket of inner city Melbourne all those years ago.“It’s a great little neighbourhood, everyone knows everyone here. I came from a little country town called Wagga Wagga, and my parents were really involved in the community there. I wanted to recreate that sense in an urban environment.” Says ChrisMore than just a café, dining at Seddon Deadly Sins remains a Seddonistic affair, offering up delicious food, quality coffee and a range of cakes and sweets to die for.Life is short, indulge a little.

embassy-cafe-west-melbourne: View photos Home Australia Victoria Restaurant in Victoria Embassy Cafe Embassy Cafe 547 Spencer St, West Melbourne VIC 3003, Australia +61 3 9328 1830 $ $ Cafe , Breakfast restaurant , Coffee shop , Restaurant 906 ratings Open 24 hours Overview View Full Menu Service Options Locations Reviews Suggest update Menu Snapshot Top categories (Drinks / Burgers / Dipping Sauces / Steak Rolls / Mains) Most orders: $1–20 View Complete Menu Overview & Highlights Welcome to Embassy Cafe, a hidden gem nestled on Spencer Street in West Melbourne. This charming cafe brings a unique blend of nostalgia and mouth-watering fare that evokes memories of simpler times. With its quirky, retro decor and an ambiance that invites you to unwind, Embassy Cafe offers more than just a meal; it’s an experience. Open 24/7, this delightful eatery caters to those late-night cravings or early morning hunger pangs, serving an enticing array of hearty dishes. Their burger selection is particularly impressive. You can choose from a custom 100% beef burger loaded with your favorite toppings for just A$11.30, or indulge in the Classic Double Cheeseburger, boasting double cheese and luscious sauce at A$14.30. For the adventurous eater, the Old School Lot Burger—a delightful combination of egg, bacon, cheese, fresh vegetables, and sauces—is a standout at A$18.00. Each bite at Embassy Cafe comes with a promise of satisfaction and value, as shared by numerous customers. One patron, 'Con Fitos,' captures the essence of the cafe perfectly, stating, “Amazing burgers and old school decor.” You can truly taste the nostalgia in every bite, making it a must-visit for burger enthusiasts. Breakfast lovers should not miss out on the Big Breakie Roll, featuring a hearty mix of double egg, bacon, and cheese, complete with a potato cake and tangy BBQ sauce for just A$13.50. The HCT Toastie is another must-try, offering a comforting blend of ham, cheese, and tomato that fits the bill for any time of day. Those who prefer sides won't be disappointed either; the Fried and Steamed Dim Sims provide an excellent accompaniment to any meal, priced at A$10.00 for four pieces. The reviews have been high and consistent, with patrons raving about the generous portions and the delightfully home-style flavors. Embassy Cafe is not just a spot to grab a bite; it's a nostalgic trip back in time, celebrating the flavors of yesteryear while ensuring customer satisfaction. With its commitment to quality and quirky charm, it's no wonder this establishment is a cherished location among locals. However, do keep in mind that they only accept cash, a charmingly retro touch that adds to the cafe's unique character. If you're in the mood for a great meal in a nostalgic setting, Embassy Cafe is where you should head. The friendly staff and comforting dishes will undoubtedly leave a lasting impression, making each visit worthwhile. butcher-shop-cafe-west-melbourne:
Home
 
 
 
 
 
 Contact
 
 
 
 
 
 Menu
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

​

 
 
 
 
 
 

A little history

​West Melbourne is a historical pocket tucked away from the bustling city centre.  It is an evolving area with a mixture of industrial, residential and commercial properties, including a mixture of Victorian single and double storey terrace houses and converted warehouses.Butcher Shop Café is nestled amongst terrace houses all built in the 1800’s.  The land for this property, no. 72, was originally owned by George Coppin who sold it to William Wood in 1875.  William Wood owned the land for many years and built a Butcher’s Shop, which is the shop that you see today.  This is where the name Butcher Shop Café comes from.It was a Butcher’s Shop into the early 20th century and has seen many faces since.  In recent years up until the end of 2014 this shop was a little take away spot for locals.  Today it is a trendy breakfast and lunch café keeping up with the famous Melbourne coffee scene.

Welcome to Hot Poppy Cafe: A Community Hub for Exceptional Coffee and Cuisine​ 
 
 
 
 Join us in the heart of North Melbourne and experience our contemporary interiors, pet-friendly atmosphere, and delicious menu offerings. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 BOOK A TABLE NOW

 ‭+61 3 9326 9299‬ 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Welcome to Hot Poppy Cafe, a beloved brunch destination nestled in the heart of North Melbourne for over 20 years
 Our café embodies a strong community spirit, offering a warm and inviting atmosphere that makes everyone feel like part of the family. Whether you’re a local or a first-time visitor, we’ve created a space where you can relax, enjoy, and feel right at home.Step inside our chic and contemporary interiors, where modern design meets comfort. We pride ourselves on delivering a diverse menu, featuring brunch favorites like avocado toast and eggs benedict, along with our renowned, skillfully prepared coffee made from the finest beans. Whether you’re looking for a cozy spot to catch up with friends or a quick, delicious bite on the go, we’ve got you covered.Hot Poppy Cafe is not just about great food and coffee; it’s also a pet-friendly haven! Our seating options include cozy indoor spaces, refreshing outdoor spots, and vibrant sidewalk seating. Enjoy the lively street scene of North Melbourne with your furry companions by your side.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Visit Us Today!
 Our café is located at 9 Errol Street, a heritage-listed building that dates back to the mid-19th centuryThe area was once part of a bustling Victorian-era shopping precinct and retains much of its historical charm, with many buildings maintaining their original features. This rich history adds a unique character to our location, offering a blend of old-world charm and modern-day comforts.
Drop in for brekkie or lunch without a booking, 7 days a week!Plan Ahead and Secure Your Spot at Hot Poppy Cafe!Looking forward to a delightful brunch or a cozy coffee break? Make sure you have the perfect table waiting for you by reserving ahead. Whether you're planning a casual meet-up or a special occasion, booking a table guarantees a seamless experience at our café. local-rules-port-melbourne:
Skip to main content 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Close Search
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Brewed for Locals & Made with Love Serving Specialty Coffee, Food, Cold Pressed Juices & Mum’s Famous Baklava 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 Coffee
 

 
 We think of coffee as the central nervous system of Local Rules Café. It connects everything — the early mornings, the regulars, the conversations and the little moments that happen around the counter every day.
We use quality beans, brew with care, and focus on getting the basics right. Whether you’re grabbing a quick takeaway or sitting down for a proper break, our coffee is made to be enjoyed, not rushed.
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 Food
 

 
 Our food is made fresh on the premises every day. Simple, honest meals prepared with care, using quality ingredients and recipes that are meant to be enjoyed, not overthought.
From something light to a proper sit-down bite, everything on the plate is made with the same approach we take to our coffee — keep it fresh, keep it genuine, and get the fundamentals right.
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 Drinks
 

 
 Alongside our coffee, we offer a range of cold-pressed and freshly squeezed juices, as well as a selection of fantastic matchas made in-house. Clean, refreshing flavours that are easy to enjoy and made with the same care as everything else we serve.
They’re a great option any time of day — whether you’re after something light, something fresh, or a break from coffee.
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 Catering
 

 
 We offer simple and flexible catering for meetings, events and get-togethers with the same food and drinks you enjoy in the café. Everything is freshly prepared and thoughtfully put together and easy to organise.
Alongside our regular offerings we’re happy to accommodate additional food options where needed. From coffee and juices to food platters and Mum’s baklava our catering is designed to suit the occasion and keep things feeling relaxed.
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 Community Highlight
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 “We support our local girls netball team and value being part of the Garden City community. It’s the small things that matter to us — showing up, backing local and staying connected to the people around us.” “Being part of the Garden City and Port Melbourne community means a lot to us. It’s about being present, backing local and contributing in a way that feels genuine.” “Our community is shaped by the people who walk through our doors every day. These everyday moments count, familiar faces and strong local connections is what keeps us together.”

meals-with-impact-docklands:
Skip to content

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Food & Community Hub 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Experience 
 
 
 
 Unique Multicultural Cuisine In Melbourne 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Food is our connector. It provides culture, memories of home and familiarity. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 We created the Food and Community Hub with a vision to be an inclusive,  vibrant space for our community, for neighbouring corporates and like-minded individuals. Centred right in the heart of Docklands, within Collins Square, it’s our home to nurture skill development in a hospitality context, welcome the community to share our love of food and help businesses meet their social procurement goals.  
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 On the menu each day we have incredible coffee provided by Piccolo Coffee Roasters, hot meals, salads, sandwiches & toasties, and to-die-for sweets inspired by, or co-created from recipes from our team members.  Importantly, this cafe supports our employment program, with all proceeds reinvested back into the social enterprise to directly fund training and support services. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Visit Us 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Location: Tower 3, Shop 1-2/747 Collins Street, Docklands (Corner of Batmans Hill Drive & Collins Street)
Trading Hours: Opened Tuesday to Thursday (8am – 3pm)Lunch served from 11am – 2pm. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Our cafe is a light-filled space that seats up to 52 guests. With just a short walk away from Southern Cross Station and situated just outside D-15 Batman’s Hill/Collins Street stop (Tram 48 & 11), we’re the perfect location for your next lunchtime meal. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Find 
 
 
 
 hot meals and nutritious salads Docklands diners love 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Every item on our menu is a reflection of home for our team.  Our meals are Halal-friendly, with vegetarian, vegan and low gluten options available. Please chat to the team to find out more. We’re also passionate about fighting food insecurity and promoting sustainability. So we take every measure possible to keep food waste to an absolute minimum. Our approach is simple yet impactful – we use every part of the ingredient to its fullest, which is why we rotate our menus frequently and donate any surplus food.Some examples of what you might find on our menu include:Chicken Gulgula is thick-cut chicken blended with our secret spice mix which includes garlic, honey, sesame and soy.Chicken Korma is a classic Indian dish with tender chicken pieces, peas and sweet potato in a mildly spiced curry sauce.Coco Au Rico is Congolese chicken meatballs with peanut butter and African spices simmered in a rich yellow sauce. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Lamb Zigni is Eritrean braised lamb using our unique berbere spice blend slow cooked in a spicy stew full of flavour.Moroccan Meatballs are made of beef and vegetables simmered in a rich tomato sauce with a North African spice blend.Vegetable Jafrezi is another classic Indian dish made with mixed vegetables, spices and herbs in a spicy stir-fry.Vegetable Tagi

grey-bliss-port-melbourne:
ABOUTGrey & Bliss – Bay Street’s Favourite Café & Dining Spot in Port Melbourne

Located right on Bay Street, Port Melbourne, Grey & Bliss has become a beloved local hotspot for specialty coffee, all-day breakfast and gourmet lunches. Whether you're here for a Five Senses coffee, our famous avocado smash, eggs benedict collection, or the indulgent blueberry & ricotta hotcakes, every dish is crafted with fresh, high-quality ingredients.

Lunch in Port Melbourne just got tastier with our crowd-pleasing char-grilled Portuguese chicken and 100% Wagyu double cheese burger. For something lighter, our vibrant salad bowls pack a flavour punch that’ll leave you craving more. Plus, with rotating seasonal specials, there’s always something new to try!

Thirsty? Sip on fresh smoothies, cold-pressed juices, or creamy milkshakes by day, then unwind after dark with local craft beers, imported wines, and signature cocktails. Pair your drinks with shareable bites or hearty meals—perfect for relaxed day on Bay Street.ABOUT coffee

Supersede Coffee is your premier destination for specialty Coffee and an elevated dining experience in the heart of Carlton, Melbourne. sir-osborn-east-melbourne:
1 Nicholson St East Melbourne 3002
222 Exhibition St Melbourne 3000

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 ABOUT US 

 
 

 
 Opened in September 2017, Sir Osborn celebrates the café culture of Melbourne with only the finest quality food and coffee on offer.  We are located at 1 Nicholson Street East Melbourne and 222 Exhibition St Melbourne.
Sir Osborn is a family owned and operated cafe offering warmth and charm to a busy and hectic day.
We are open for breakfast, brunch, lunch and afternoon tea from Monday to Friday 5:30am – 3:00pm

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 CATERING 

 
 

 
 Sir Osborn specialises in catering for corporate functions and private functions and is a great way to fire up your next event.  No matter what size or type of function you have we are committed to providing you with on trend food that is high in quality and tailored to your needs. We offer flexible catering options that are loved by both big and small groups. Please contact us and let our friendly staff help you design the perfect catering package for your next event.
For all your catering needs, you can order online or call us on 0421 137 350 or email  Sirosborncatering@gmail.com

awa-french-crperie-fitzroy:
Explore Our MenuA Taste of Paris,
Right HereAt Awa French Crêperie & Café, every crêpe is crafted with care, freshly made, beautifully presented, and inspired by the timeless charm of Parisian cafés. We use only the finest ingredients, sourcing local and organic produce whenever possible. Each crêpe or galette is made to order, so you can savour both the freshness and the artistry behind every plate.Made Fresh,
Served French.Made Fresh,Served French.Made Fresh,Served French.Made Fresh,Served French.AboutAwa French Crêperie &CaféGrowing up in Paris, crêpes were an everyday pleasure that brought people together, simple, comforting, and always made with love.
​

​In 2014, Wali took a leap of faith and moved from Paris, France to Melbourne, Australia, hoping to bring his dream to life. His vision was simple: to share the same joy he experienced as a child, enjoying crêpes made with the rich, authentic flavours passed down from his mother and grandmother.

​

Wali spent more than ten years working in hospitality, learning every part of the craft from making and roasting coffee to perfecting the delicate art of crêpes.

​

Awa French Crêperie & Café was created from that passion and a long-held dream to open a place that feels warm, welcoming, and distinctly Parisian. The aim is to share the joy of true French crêpes made with care and quality ingredients in a space that makes people smile.

​

Our galettes are made with buckwheat flour imported directly from Brittany in France, the birthplace of traditional French crêperies. Our sweet crêpes are prepared in the classic way with plenty of eggs, fresh ingredients, and careful attention to detail in every pour and fold. To complement them, the menu also features coffee, smoothies, juices, rich chocolate drinks and sandwiches.

​

The crêperie’s French music, charming décor, authentic newspapers, and French-speaking staff create an atmosphere that feels like a journey to Brittany itself.

​

Located at 180 Brunswick Street, Fitzroy, Awa French Crêperie & Café is cosy, friendly, and French at heart, offering Melburnians a little taste of Paris right here at home. 

​Book Now
 
 
 

Why UsOur crêperie has become a cherished part of the neighbourhood. With glowing reviews and loyal customers, Awa French Crêperie &Café is known for making every visit feel special.Authentic French RecipesEvery crêpe we serve is crafted using time-honoured techniques and traditional recipes passed down from French kitchens. Our ingredients are carefully selected to reflect the true flavours of France.Artisan Touch, AlwaysFrom the perfect swirl of batter to the delicate folding of each crêpe, our chefs bring a handcrafted touch to every plate. It’s not just food—it’s edible artistry, made fresh to order.Step into Awa French Crêperie & Café and you’re stepping into a little piece of Paris. Our warm, welcoming space offers the charm of a French café, whether you're here for a morning coffee or a sweet afternoon treat.Email Us

 Loading image: A long black sits on the wooden window sill at Patricia. A customer's feet can be seen in the background.
 
 
 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 Our Menu
 
 
 The idea behind our menu at Patricia is to simplify the options as much as possible, with the aim of making the ordering process more streamlined and to take the focus off the less important particulars like how frothy the milk is and what type of vessel it's in.
Our espresso machine is a La Marzocco Strada, and we offer our seasonal 'House' and a smaller lot 'Guest' espresso, both roasted by us. Check those out here.
All of our coffees are available with ice too - our Iced Filter coffee is one of our most popular warm weather drinks.
White
Our typical 'White' coffee is a double shot of your espresso offering of choice, with nice creamy milk, steamed to between 57°C and 60°C. We're always happy to make any adjustments to that recipe to suit you of course.
We offer these milk options:

Full cream
Skim

Oat 

Soy

Black
A 'Black' coffee can be made how you like, brewed with either espresso offering as a single or double espresso, or as a long black, which we make with a double shot and 70mL of 70°C water.
Filter
Our filter coffee is carefully batch brewed and we normally have one or two options, selected from our current offerings.

quists-coffee-melbourne:
Melbourne's first coffee roasters since 1938 
 
 
 
  Quists has a reputation for quality bean selection, consistent roasting and blending which our customers love. Importing premier beans from around the globe, our Australian owned & operated family business roasts locally right here in Melbourne. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Shop Now
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Why Choose Quists? 
 
 
 
 We're Melbourne's original coffee roasters, family-owned and
award-winning. We've got more reasons to choose us than you can shake a latte
at – so sit back, relax and let us convince you on why Quist's are the best coffee roasters in the business. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Melbourne's First Coffee Roaster 
 
 
 Melbourne's love affair with coffee started here. As the city's first coffee roaster, we've been brewing up the magic since 1938. From classic flat whites to trendy cold brews, we've witnessed and influenced Melbourne's coffee culture revolution, then evolution - you're welcome! 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Family Run & Owned 
 
 
 At Quists' Coffee, we're more than just roasters; we're family. While many Australian coffee roasters are now corporate-owned, we've stayed true to our roots. Our passion for coffee runs deep, passed down through 3 generations. Taste the care that goes into every Quists' coffee, crafted by our family. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Award Winning Coffee 
 
 
 We're not just coffee roasters; we're award-winning coffee roasters. Our Miscela Italiana blend has bagged multiple awards, including a coveted spot in the Australian Coffee Roasters Hall of Fame. It's a testament to our dedication to quality and flavour. You can buy our coffee online or in store. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 State of the Art Coffee Roasting Plant 
 
 
 Our Melbourne-based roasting plant is state-of-the-art, ensuring every bean is roasted to perfection. From blends to single origins and specialty coffees, it's like Wonka's chocolate factory—except with our Master Roaster Jim calling the (espresso) shots.

degraves-espresso-bar-melbourne:
Locally Sourced. Beautifully Served
 
 
 
 
 
 At Degraves Espresso Melbourne, we are proud to announce that our food and philosophy have been paying homage to “nostalgia” since our reopening in May 2022. Our unique combination of Spanish and European flavours, complemented by the classic Melbourne Brunch culture, has solidified our reputation as a beacon in the Melbourne Breakfast scene. Open for brunch 7 days from 7am and offering dinner 6 nights, we ensure that our culinary delights are accessible whenever your cravings strike.
Our aim and approach to food remain unchanged: to preserve the essence of our iconic destination, whilst elevating it to match the standards of Melbourne’s most distinguished dining locales. With our full A ‘La Carte European Dinner menu, Degraves Street witnesses an added layer of sophistication, seamlessly blending with its inherent charm.
We’re driven by the ambition to continually refine our offerings, pushing culinary boundaries in a city renowned for its vibrant food culture. Simplicity might be at the heart of our dishes, but each is a testament to meticulous craftsmanship, with a keen emphasis on bold, balanced flavours. The passion and precision of our dedicated young kitchen team are evident in every bite.
In a world where food transcends being a mere meal, sharing is an art we celebrate. We invite you to partake in our European culinary journey, fostering bonds over shared plates and shared moments. Your table at Degraves Espresso Melbourne awaits.
 
 Functions
cuff-melbourne:
About UsOur StoryWelcome to Cuff, one of Melbourne's best brunch destinations, nestled in the heart of Flinders Lane, Melbourne. Renowned for our exceptional brunch offerings, specialty coffee from ONA Coffee Roasters and meticulously crafted drinks.

Our breakfast menu is curated of delectable dishes, from classic smashed avocado toast, to our spicy chili scramble and a crowd favourite vegetarian corn fritters. Our specialty coffee, roasted locally and brewed by our baristas, ensuring the perfect cup every time, making it the ideal complement to our delicious brunch fare.

At Cuff, we pride ourselves on creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. Whether you're catching up with friends over a leisurely weekday brunch, grabbing a quick coffee on your way to work, our stylish and cozy setting provides the perfect backdrop for any occasion.

​

Join us today at a thriving coffee and breakfast house, with a simple philosophy of getting the basics right and staying consistent.

​​

​

Featured in:Featured in Sitchu"The best breakfast in Melbourne CBD"ContactGround Floor, 325 Flinders Lane, Melbourne VIC 3000info@cuffmelbourne.com(03) 9620 7122

Saturday - 8am - 2.30pm (kitchen closes at 2pm)

 Restaurant in the heart of the Melbourne CBD 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 About Our Menu 
 
 
 
 Situated at 525 Little Collins Street, in the heart of Melbourne CBD, Henry & The Fox offers a fantastic setting for a lunch break, brunch or dinner with friends. Our menu is focused on fresh, local ingredients and has something to delight everyone, including a variety of vegan and vegetarian options for those seeking plant-based delights.We also focus on diverse dietary needs with various options for coeliacs, dairy-free, nut allergy, FODMAP, paleo and other allergies you can match our menu with your requirements by searching our partner Foodini’s tailored menu. We also offer a diverse selection of beers, wines, cocktails, and spirits, ideal for unwinding with an afternoon drink or coffee in the company of colleagues. When you’re in need of a great restaurant experience in Melbourne CBD, including diverse dietary preferences, Henry and the Fox is ready to welcome you.

serotonin-eatery-burnley:
The Menu
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 Discover our Menu
 
 
 
 Nutrition

 Hydration

 Organic Desserts

 kids 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Every time you eat, you are either feeding disease or fighting it.  At Serotonin, our food is all house-made, offering a rainbow of colour to fill your body with the nutrients it requires to thrive. With the use of our fresh, organic, local + fair trade ingredients, our delicious plant-based meals ensure you can eat these for the rest of your life.  
Our unique and creative mains are packed with tryptophan, an essential amino acid, which elevates your Serotonin levels to help stabilise your mood (and ultimately, bringing happiness). With our generous serving sizes, each dish features nutritionally complexed clean ingredients, so you can eat until you are satiated, leaving you and your tummy happy.
Melbourne, being so multicultural, inspired us to utilise cuisines from across the globe to create a unique and satisfying plant-based menu that not only is nourishing for you but tastes good too. With an abundance of gluten free, vegan and onion/garlic free options, we ensure no one misses out and that everyone leaves feeling nourished and happy from the inside out.

rowena-corner-store-richmond:
a slice of the mediterranean in melbourne

 

 

 
 COFFEE - BRUNCH - LUNCH - GROCERIES

 

 

 
 TUE–FRI: 7.30AM–3PMSAT–SUN: 8AM–3PMKITCHEN CLOSES AT 2.30PM

 

 

 
 44 ROWENA PDERICHMOND VIC 3121(03) 9421 3262mail@rowenacornerstore.com

 

 

 
 INSTAGRAMFACEBOOK

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 The Rowena recipe is distinctly Melbourne. Take a hefty serving of traditional Mediterranean provincial cooking, add a splash of international goodness and pinch of modern innovation and simmer slowly over a warm Richmond flame. The result is something warm, sincere and soulful. It’s heartwarmingly familiar, and yet, interesting and fresh.

 

 

 
 Mamma Knows East, 2017“There really isn’t any place quite like Rowena”

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 OUR FOOD PHILOSOPHY

 

 

 
 Deeply rooted in the heritage of provincial Mediterranean kitchens, our offerings have evolved through the cafe culture which is uniquely Melbourne.It started with Mamma in the kitchen 20 years ago, cooking up simple and sincere breakfasts and lunches for locals and travellers alike. Even though Mamma has hung up her apron (for the most part), her recipes, flavour combinations, and sense of communal hospitality still remains at the heart of our kitchen today.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 SEE THE MENU

two-birds-one-stone-south-yarra:
Best Breakfast Cafe South YarraCall Now
 
 
 

Best Breakfast Restaurant in South YarraAt Two Birds One Stone, we are committed to serving you some of the finest breakfast dishes. We think the best way to do that is by indulging in timeless classics that have defined this morning ritual for generations. Some breakfast traditions never go out of style and we celebrate that. Our menu offers a range of classic breakfast favourites that invoke a sense of nostalgia.

 

From Brulee French toast to perfectly poached eggs, each dish delivers a comforting culinary delight. Our stack of fluffy Ricotta pancakes or savour the smoky allure of our bacon can start your day on the right foot. Whether you are gearing up for a busy workday or embarking on a leisurely weekend, our breakfast options are the perfect start.TestimonialsMandeep Singh KhalwaraBest Cafe in South Yarra. My personal favorite. Very cozy ambience and scrumptious food. French inspired menu to choose from. Great for breakfast, brunch or lunch.Cuong DuongCame here for a quick coffee and a small breakfast. Coffee was solid, and we had the soba noodles which were nicely balanced - tasty without being too saucy or salty.MelbournelopsOne of our favourite locals. Food is always super fresh and tasty, service is good and the vibe is spot on. Doesn’t get much better than this. We ordered the eggs Benny and baked eggs on our most recent visit - delicious.Healthy Breakfast Options to Kickstart Your DayOur renowned breakfast menu has a variety of choices catering to different palates and dietary preferences. Committed to increasing Melbourne’s culinary diversity, we ensure there’s something for everyone. You can choose from classic, healthy, vegan or vegetarian options, all while savouring Two Birds One Stone's signature dishes.Classic ComfortsIf you hold a special affinity for the classics, we offer a selection of timeless favourites with a creative twist. Dive into perfectly cooked eggs atop toast or indulge in the feast that is our breakfast board. You can also refresh your taste buds with smashed avocado toast topped with heirloom tomatoes. Other popular choices that never fail to please include Brulee French toast with mango, Eggs Benedict, and pan-seared salmon with grilled asparagus.Healthy and WholesomeFor those prioritising their health, we’ve got delicious options packed with nourishment. Whether you crave gluten-free toast or our house-made Bircher, we have it all. Also, we strive to make healthy eating a delightful experience with our sauteed mixed mushrooms and protein-rich smoked salmon.Plant-powered BreakfastAre you searching for some of the best vegan breakfast in Melbourne? Look no further as we’ve a range that showcases the vibrant flavour of plant-based cuisine. From avocado toast adorned with colourful toppings to hearty coconut pudding and cooling soba noodle salad, our handcrafted creations ensure a satisfying meal every time.Signature CreationsCraving to savour a dish that’s a fusi

 What People Say About Our Richmond Bakery 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 We’re incredibly proud to share that Almost French has been named Business of the Year and also took home Outstanding Bakery/Cake at the East Melbourne Local Business Awards!This recognition means the world to our team, who pour their heart and skill into every pastry, tart, and croissant. Thank you to our amazing community for your continued support – we couldn’t do it without you!Here’s to more delicious moments ahead 🥐 ✨ 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Founder: Alex Charasse
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 About Us 
 
 
 
 At Almost French, we bring a taste of Paris to the heart of Melbourne. 
 
 
 
 What started as a passion for traditional French baking has become a daily ritual for locals looking for quality, comfort, and a little indulgence.Our team of bakers rise early every morning to craft fresh pastries, sourdough, desserts, and custom cakes—by hand, with care, and always with real ingredients.We’re here seven days a week serving up the classics, experimenting with new creations, and sharing our love of French patisserie with Melbourne.Led by our founder Alex, we combine years of experience with a love of creativity and great food. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Where To Find Us 
 
 
 
 Located At 138 Swan Street, Richmond, VIC 3121 
 
 
 
 
 
 Opening Hours: 
 
 
 
 Mon-Sat: 7:00 AM – 4:00 PMSun: 7:30 AM – 4:00 PM 
 
 
 
 
 
 Phone: 
 
 
 
 (03) 9429 2080 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Visit Us Today →
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Stay Up To Date With Almost French 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Frequently Asked Questions 
 
 
 
 
 
 What types of pastries do you offer?We offer a wide range of authentic French-style pastries, including croissants, pain au chocolat, eclairs, macarons, tarts, and seasonal specialties.
 
 Do you offer gluten-free or vegan options?Yes, we have a selection of gluten-free and vegan treats! Availability may vary daily, so feel free to call ahead or check our online menu.

What’s on at Sabi
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 Sabi Sounds — Sunday Run Club
 

 
 Every Sunday · 7:30AM @Sabi SoundsEasy pace. Friendly faces. Good energy. Move to music, then wind down with matcha, coffee and baked goods after. Sunday mornings, done right.
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 Register free
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 'Sounds of.. series' 
 

 
 Sat 30 May | 7:30pm-10:30pm. $13pp Enjoy the Sounds of… series. Feat. Downtempo hip hop • dub • breakbeats . Special guest - DJ onelove.child on the decks. Includes welcome drink.
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 Get Tickets
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 Checkmate Chess — Sonic Strategies
 

 
 Wed 27 May · 7:30–10PM · $25pp Limited spotsJoin Sabi Sounds x Sonic Strategies for a beginner-friendly Board & Banter night — where good moves meet good moods. Learn, play, and connect over chess, tea, baked goods. Tea by Somage. Includes Tea & pastry buffet.
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 Get tickets
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 Sketch & Sip — Creative Evenings
 

 
 Wed 3 June | 7pm-9:30pm. $35pp incl. welcome drink.Sketch & Sip is back!After a beautiful first session, we’re doing it again — another slow evening of drawing, music, and good energy at Sabi Sounds. Hosted by Paris, sketch freely, sip something nice, and let the night unfold around you. No experience needed. Just come as you are.
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 Get tickets 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 Japanse City Pop Vinyl Party
 

 
 Thursday June 11 | 7:30 – 9PM $18incl. welcome drink A night of Japanese citypop on vinyl — smooth grooves, soft synths, jazz-funk and late-night nostalgia pulled straight from Tokyo’s golden era of the late ’70s and ’80s. Presented by Joel Shortman of Rathdowne Records.
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 Get tickets
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 Olivia Rodrigo - Tribute Party
 

 
 Friday June 12 | 7:30 – 10PM.$18 (incl. sweet treats & welcome drink)A Night Dedicated to “You Seem Pretty Sad For A Girl In Love” — Expect a soundtrack moving between emotional ballads, messy anthems, late-night feelings, and everything in between.
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 Get Tickets
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 Vision to Action Workshop
 

 
 Thursday June 25 | 7:30 – 9:30PM.$35 (incl. tea buffet by Somage)Intentional evening of reflection, goal-setting, and creative planning with Stephanie from my8dayweek.This Workshop is designed to help you slow down, reconnect with your goals, and turn ideas into something tangible.
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 Get Tickets
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 Music Bingo Nite
 

 
 Wed June 24 | 7:30 – 9PM.$10Join us for a night of Music Bingo — where classic bingo gets a soundtrack upgrade. Instead of numbers, expect songs you know and love played through the room as you listen, mark your card, and compete for the win.
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 Get Tickets

Mothers Day Breakfast In Bed Boxes at Petite.
This Mother’s Day, celebrate that special person with a beautifully curated Breakfast in Bed Box — designed to bring a little indulgence, warmth, and love to their morning.
Each box is thoughtfully prepared with a selection of our favourite treats: a buttery croissant served with house-made raspberry jam and cultured butter, a petite overnight oats, a delicate mini frittata, a limited edition Loco Love chocolate, and a soothing organic Love Tea teabag — everything needed for a slow, comforting start to the day.
To make it even more personal, every box includes a Mother’s Day card for you to customise with your own heartfelt message, turning a simple gesture into something truly meaningful.
As a small extra touch, the first 20 orders will also receive a complimentary regular coffee — perfect to enjoy alongside the box or save for a future visit.
A simple, beautiful way to say thank you, I love you, and you deserve to be celebrated 🤍

Boxes are to be picked up Sunday the 10th of May between 8am-11am at Petite by Matilda - 14 Arcade Road, Mont Albert North, 3129.

 Nestled in Melbourne’s leafy suburb of Balwyn, East & Co Café brings the same welcoming spirit as any other family cafe, into a bright and contemporary space on Whitehorse Road.  Elegant café and catering based in Box Hill Café Saporo serves all your lunch and café favourites with an elegant twist in the heart of Box Hill.We are an elegant, fully licensed café selling coffee, sweets, gourmet sandwiches and hot food that will meet and exceed your expectations every time.As well as providing exquisite food and coffee in store, we offer full catering and function services to suit any of your external party or corporate function needs. 
 
 
 
 Our location Located right by the corner of Whitehorse Rd and Elgar Rd, we operate out of a recently renovated building, giving us access to some of the most state-of-the-art equipment and facilities in Melbourne!At only three years old, we can offer you a unique and contemporary experience that you won’t be able to find anywhere else. 
 
 
 
 About Us Our cooks and baristas are the best and most experienced in the business, with years of training and a passion for food, coffee and customer service.Open from early morning until late afternoon Monday to Thursday we are a perfect stop for breakfast before work, lunch on your break or are even open late on Friday for a well earned drink at the end of the week! 
 
 
 services Our coffee and café favourites are the best in Melbourne, and if they don’t alone keep bringing you back our rewarding customer loyalty system will!But we don’t just serve excellent breakfast, lunch and coffee instore.We also offer a diverse array of catering options for all your private party and corporate function needs, ranging from fresh sandwiches to hot finger food, the service is excellent and can cater to any dietary requirements.

the-penny-drop-box-hill:
OUR STORY
YOUR DESTINATION FOR BOX HILL’S BEST EATERY
The Penny Drop began as a little coffee pop-up in Box Hill, where hundreds of bleary-eyed commuters dropped by every morning to get their freshly prepared coffees. After seeing their customers’ enthusiasm for the brand and realising that there was a gap in the market for a vibrant all-day eatery in Box Hill, the penny metaphorically dropped for the owners.
Today, The Penny Drop is a permanent 100-seater restaurant sitting on the ground floor of the newly refurbished ATO building on Whitehorse Road. Designed by We Are Huntly, the space effortlessly combines high ceilings and muted earthy tones to create a warm and inviting oasis – perfect for diners wanting to escape the daily Melbourne grind.
Serving breakfast, lunch and dinner, The Penny Drop’s modern Australian menu offers a range of exciting dishes such as breakfast classics through to unique share plates with an Asian-inspired twist. Fully licensed, The Penny Drop is open seven days a week; bookings are warmly accepted for dinner and walk-ins are available at all other times.
We have been featured in some of Melbourne’s most loved publications including Good Food Guide, Broadsheet, Urban List and Weekend Notes. We hope to see you soon!

milkwine-co-heathmont:
backtotopmilk+wine co.OUR CAFE + WINE BARAtmosphere that 

matches the food and 

wine offeringWe believe in using fresh, locally sourced ingredients in all of our breakfast, brunch and lunch dishes. While our seasonal menu is stacked with lots of healthy options, we have also included a touch of the ‘American vibe’ with dishes like our Eggs Benedict with chipotle hollandaise and smoked brisket. There will always be something a bit unique that pushes the boundaries on our specials board too for those who like to try something new! We bake all our cakes, muffins and snack items in house and we also offer a wide range of sandwiches, salads and bagels for those people on the go. Local fresh cuisine
for everyoneMilk+Wine Co. is a family-run business offering local knowledge and hospitality. Run by homegrown Heathmont lovers, the owners recognise the importance of community; giving Heathmont back a place for locals to call home.

 

Milk+Wine Co. has taken over the location of the iconic cafe formally known as Barclays, and are offering a contemporary menu and atmosphere complemented with exceptional customer service.
 
 
 
 

our menuOur All-Day MenuOur Drinks Menu
 
 
 
 

PIFcontact usSay hello!196–198 Canterbury Road, Heathmont 3135 

hello@milkandwine.com.au 

p:  03 8719 8877

​

Opening Hours

Monday - Friday 7am-3:00pm

Saturday 7:30am-3:00pm

Sunday 7:30am-2:00pmBook a TablePay it ForwardIn a time where there is a lot of bad news and families are suffering in ways they have not before, the team at Milk+Wine Co. are getting behind the community and trying to make a difference and have therefore, implemented our ‘Pay it Forward’ Program.

 

What does this mean? Customers and businesses have been buying our $35 family meals and we are donating these meals to the people in our community who need them most. These are people who have lost their jobs, financially they are struggling, mentally are not coping with everything that is going on or, someone who just needs a night off and a smile on their face. 

 

We have donated over 1000 meals to date, have held days specifically dedicated to our healthcare, emergency and essential workers and we are working with groups like the Baptist Church and district nursing services to provide meals to the most vulnerable people in our community. 

 

So, how can you get behind it? You could purchase a meal at the café or online, you could nominate someone you know who could benefit from one of these meals via our Facebook or Instagram pages or via email hello@milkandwine.com.au.

 

We are looking to help the people who need it most right now and while we cannot promise the world, we can promise we will do what we can.
