flora-juice-sunshine: Skip to content GET IN TOUCH info@florajuice.com.au Facebook Twitter Youtube Menu +61385963631 FLORA JUICE MENUS OUR SHOP OUR MENUS SEE ALL MENUS What’s in my fruit juice? What to look forLess than 250kJ per 100mlNo added sugarAt least 40mg vitamin C per 100mlNo preservatives (important especially if you have an intolerance)Some fruit juices are identical to the juice you might freshly squeeze at home, while others are made with reconstituted juice (this must be stated on the label). There isn’t much difference nutritionally, some vitamin C may be lost during this process, but manufacturers add it back before it is bottled. If you’re after 100 per cent juice, it pays to check the fine print on the label. Some juices contain preservatives to prolong their shelf life, flavours (natural or artificial) and acidity regulators to give a consistency to the taste between batches. A juice ‘blend’ is simply a mix of different juices (eg. a breakfast juice).These have just 5–25 per cent juice, with water as the main ingredient. Usually, they contain added sugar or sweeteners such as stevia (derived from a plant, so it allows brands to claim ‘all-natural’ ingredients) or sucralose, an artificial sweetener.The recommended serving of juice is only 125ml (½ cup), less than the amount we drink in a tall glass. Drinking more than this can add extra, unwanted kilojoules to your day. Fruit Juice Trends RECENT INFORMATIONS Global Beverage TrendsFor the past five years, we can see dozens of influencers online who are sweating in the gym to form a so-called perfect body. These influencers and bloggers are spreading the trend of the body cult all around the globe. Everyone wants to reach visible results as fast as possible. This can be done with the help of functional products. A sports drink with branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs) or essential amino acids (EAAs) can help an athlete get results much faster or a protein drink can help them grow muscles faster.It is well known that amino acids are the main ingredient in muscles. They play very specific key roles in health and performance in human physiology and help athletes not only retain muscle but also burn fat. Proteins are made up of both essential and non-essential amino acids that can be used by the body for a plethora of benefits. Some of these key benefits, besides muscle building, include improved mineral absorption and improved focus during exercise. The body must break the protein down into these free-form amino acids in order for them to function. Consuming amino acids in their free form is beneficial since these amino acids can address their function almost immediately.Branched-chain amino acids include the essential amino acids leucine, isoleucine, and valine. They are very popular among strength athletes, yet there is strong evidence validating their use for endurance training and racing as well. Numerous research studies have shown these three key amino acids to be extremely important to consume, especi

 STORY

 MENU
 COFFEE
 CONTACT

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

SANGAS + BAKED GOODS
 
 
The humble sandwich has come a long way in recent times, with many sandwich shops boasting to have some of Melbourne's best sandwiches. And whilst all these sangas might boast top-tier ingredients, the thing that we reckon sets the menu at Double Dutch Bakery apart, is the fact that our delicious sandwiches and focaccias are made with fresh bread, which is baked in-house every morning, by our expert baker, Jacob.
And where would one of Melbourne's best bakeries be without a range of sweet treats and savoury baked goods? (Nowhere good, that's for sure!)We offer a wide range of baked goods and delicious pastries which are baked fresh every morning and crafted with only the finest ingredients, expertly paired flavours, and locally sourced biodynamic flour.
 
 

MENU

 
 Please note we have a seasonal, and rotational menu, and not all items are listed on our website. 
The items listed below are some of our staples.
We often sell out early, and cannot guarantee availability of any items.

The ultimate fusion restaurant in Travancore, perfect for those searching for top-rated cafes in Flemington. We specialize in Middle-Eastern fusion cuisine, offering a mouthwatering variety of dishes like crispy falafel, creamy soups, juicy burgers, and a refreshing selection of hot and cold drinks. Our expertly crafted special breakfast menu is a favorite among locals and visitors alike, featuring delicious options to start your day right. As a leading Travancore cafe and a popular choice for Flemington cafes, we pride ourselves on serving the finest coffee, from rich espressos to chilled iced lattes. Whether you’re looking for a relaxing breakfast, a quick lunch, or a cozy coffee spot, Phat Milk Cafe is your go-to destination for fusion food in Travancore and Flemington.

Welcome to Sweet Evelyn Cafe

 

 

 
 Your neighborhood escape for exceptional coffee, nourishing food, and genuine community. From sun-drenched mornings to cozy afternoons, we’re here to make every visit a little brighter. We believe in small moments that leave a lasting impression: the perfect pour-over, the smell of warm banana bread, a spontaneous chat with a stranger who becomes a friend. That’s the Sweet Evelyn experience.Come in, slow down, and stay awhile.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 Order Now
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 About Us

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 At Sweet Evelyn CafeWe believe great ventures start with a spark of inspiration. Our passion for community and delightful food shapes our cafe into a creative space where friendships flourish and stories are shared. Whether enjoying a quiet moment, catching up with friends, or collaborating on a new project, Sweet Evelyn Cafe supports your journey. Our menu features carefully crafted dishes made with the finest ingredients—from freshly brewed coffee to wholesome meals. We provide a warm atmosphere to relax and savor every bite. Our commitment to authenticity invites you to be yourself, share ideas, and connect with others. Each visit aims to create unique experiences and lasting memories. Join us in building a community one cup at a time. a1-lebanese-bakery-brunswick:
Authentic Lebanese bread, pies and pizza since 1992. Brunswick-born. Family-owned. Loved across Melbourne.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 Find Your Store
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Three Iconic Locations

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 A1 Brunswick

 

 

 
 643-645 Sydney Rd. BrunswickOur birthplace and flagship store in Brunswick, where A1 Bakery began as a Lebanese bakery in Melbourne.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 Explore Brunswick
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 A1 Fitzroy

 

 

 
 295 Brunswick St. FitzroyCompact and convenient, our Fitzroy location is ideal for takeaway lunch and Lebanese food on the go.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 Explore Fitzroy
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 A1 Highpoint

 

 

 
 L2 Highpoint Shopping CentreFresh Middle Eastern bakery fare, ready to grab and go at Highpoint.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 Explore Highpoint
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Middle-Eastern Grocery

 

 

 
 From everyday pantry staples to hard-to-find Middle Eastern ingredients, our Lebanese grocery shelves are stocked with the flavours of home. Pick up zaatar, olives, tahini, pickles, sweets and more, the same ingredients we use in our kitchen, ready for yours. Perfect for anyone looking for authentic Lebanese groceries and Middle Eastern food in Melbourne.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 Explore the Grocery
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Your All-Time Favourite MenuFrom zaatar and falafel to wraps, manoush, pizzas and platters, discover all your A1 favourites made fresh daily

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 Find Store Menus
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Catering for any occasion

 

 

 
 Planning a gathering, event or office lunch? Our Middle Eastern and Lebanese catering makes it easy to feed a crowd. Choose from fresh pastries, mini pizzas, dips, falafel and more, all made to order for parties, corporate catering and family celebrations in Melbourne.All catering must be pre ordered at least one day in advance.

 131 Nicholson St, Brunswick East VIC 3057
 
 
 

 
 
 +61 3 9088 8442
 
 
 
 

 
 
 [email protected]
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Book Now
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Book Now
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Coffee Roasted on siteExperience our house-roasted blend and single origin coffee, crafted by award winning roaster Mark Leo.Book NowAll day brunch or bagel menuClick below to be taken directly to our online brunch and bagel menuMenu'Melbourne's leading Dog Friendly CafeBring your furry friends along! Our cafe offers a welcoming space for pets and their owners along with our very own dog menu.Book Now 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Our Story and Mission Bellboy Cafe is serving some of the best coffee in Brunswick, best brunch in Brunswick and is one of the best breakfast cafes in Melbourne.  Located at the East Brunswick Village on Nicholson Street, we’re serving the local community in Brunswick, Northcote, North Fitzroy and Carlton North. With a modern take on Melbourne brunch classics, a dedicated (NYC-style) bagel menu and coffee roasted on site by award-winning Roaster, Mark Leo, Bellboy’s goal is to ensure that time spent at the Cafe is the best part of your day. Bellboy is the best coffee, best brunch and best breakfast to refuel after any of the nearby  Kirkdale Reserve Park Run , Parkville Parkrun , or Coburg Parkrun. Or if you’re visiting the magical Harry Potter Exhibition  we’re conveniently located just a short drive away with ample free parking on site. Bellboy’s name was inspired by owner Emilio Rogliano’s first ever job in the hotel industry and is a tribute to his love of service and hospitality. You will find subtle nods to ‘Bellboys’ and hotels throughout the Café.

cibi-cafe-dine-in-collingwood:
CIBI's Traditional Japanese Breakfast
 
 Every weekend since we opened CIBI in 2008, we have served a Japanese breakfast. This breakfast is the embodiment of our philosophy - nourishing homely food that we simply want to enjoy eating and that's good for our bodies.The typical Japanese breakfast consists of many different ingredients, including seasonal ones, together with a balanced amount of seasoning and flavour. They are thoughtfully prepared to nourish the body and feed the soul with the right balance of ingredients and nutritional goodness. Traditionally, someone in the extended family - it tends to be the mother, grandmother or even great-grandmother - would prepare breakfast for the whole family. Often there are vegetables, salads, fish, tsukemono (pickled seasonal vegetables), as well as rice and miso soup. We may eat ten or more ingredients during the meal with rice and miso soup as complementary dishes.At CIBI, there is no focus on a particular ingredient seasoning or diet. Instead, the focus is on preparing a nutritious and delicious meal. In the same way, there is no set order to eat a Japanese breakfast. Just dip in and eat it in whatever combination of dishes and flavours you like! Try it and you will really experience the goodness at the heart of Japanese food culture. Eat your Japanese breakfast with Japanese tea, which will give you the complete Japanese breakfast experience.Traditional Japanese preserved foods such as nori (dried seaweed sheets), umeboshi (sour plum), natto (Fermented soybeans), and tsukemono are good accompaniments for the rice in this breakfast.Find your Japanese Breakfast essentials!

atomica-caff-fitzroy:
Elektra Himalayan Alchemy House
Modern, Eclectic Himalayan infused cafe located in Fitzroy Melbourne. 
MenuLocation Cafe
Rustic at the edges, colorful in the middle, and welcoming all around, Elektra is a Himalayan infused cafe and a Brunswick Street must for any wanderers of the world and explorers of tastes, spices and fantastic chai/coffee.

Surrounded by stunning artworks, lush greenery and distinctive design, the eclectic cafe offers a unique experience on all aspects. Enjoy a mouth-watering, Himalayan inspired breakfast/brunch in a vibrant, yet relaxed atmosphere.

You’ll be swept up into the Himalayas at Elektra.Contact UsEverest BenedictOkra FriesAnnapurna saladVegan tacosElektra is a fusion cafe that combines Nepalese and Australia food. Ignite your senses with a heaps of unique vegan dishes at Elektra which is a major highlight of the cafe.Buy Chai Online
Chai is a central part of Nepalese culture and it is enjoyed by everyone regardless of religion, social status or time of day. Chai seems to help connect people for some reason, therefore we would like to share this traditional taste of Nepal with you.
To give a perfect balance of aroma and sweetness, we use authentic Himalayan spices (ginger, cardamom, pepper, cinnamon, aniseed, nutmeg and cloves), infused with organic Nepalese black tea leaves and a hint of Australian organic honey to make this Himalayan sticky chai.

Our chai is  preservative-free, refined sugar-free, gluten-free, coeliac friendly and available in vegan option.Buy NowEverest
As named after the highest summit of world the Everest coffee bean as defines itself as full
caturra Arabic beans with 80% yielding from high altitude land of Nepal and infused with Ethiopian beans to give a nutty and aromatic flavor punch.

The Nepalese beans grown in the Himalayan region in Nepal, combined with the ideal growing conditions and soils produces a superior speciality graded quality in taste and smoothness in the cup. It has a very mild acidity, light body and soft-smooth flavor and has delicate floral tones with hints of jasmine and cinnamon to give you a creamy silky texture even with non dairy milk options. The unique beans are mildly roasted in Melbourne for a perfect cuppa.Chai Pots 
Our magnificent Chai is served on handmade terra-cotta pots which are made in Melbourne by the supremely talented potter Nicole Cocis. And it is made, like all earthenware, by firing in kiln. The terracotta pots are glazed for hygienic purpose and are dishwasher safe.

Chai drinkers at Elektra, swear by the superiority of the earthen pot. Our chai is suffused with the earthy aroma from the terracotta pots giving it a rich and earthy flavor.Himalayan Alchemy House

 Marios 40th Anniversary

8am -10pm
Join in the celebrations, with complimentary cake, our famous chocolate, date and almond torte and prosecco on arrival.Diners will also receive a complimentary 40th anniversary book, celebrating and commemorating 40 years of Marios.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Our Menu
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Marios is the beating heart of Melbourne’s cosmopolitan cafe culture. Vibrant street-side ambiance. Classic Italian cuisine. Attentive service. Unpretentious devotion to excellent coffee.
 
 View Our Menu
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Marios was established in 1986 by Mario Maccarone and Mario De Pasquale, two Italian-Australian waiters with a radical vision for a new, inclusive dining experience in the largely abandoned bohemian quarter just north of Melbourne’s CBD.
 
 Read Our Story
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Food & Wine
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Marios’ menu reflects our guiding principles of exceptional quality and accessibility for casual diners. Our cuisine is traditional but distinctive. Breakfast is served until 5pm. Our cellar of local and international wines is handpicked and our coffee undiluted by skinny or decaf.
 
 View Detail
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Art
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Since 1988, the walls of Marios have comprised a dynamic exhibition of artworks in a range of media, mostly by local and emerging artists but widely sourced and ever evolving. Artists are selected by application, with the curatorial input of Melanie Caple.

pillar-of-pepper-fitzroy-north:
Brunch Near MeYour Top Choice for a Breakfast Cafe in Fitzroy NorthWelcome to Pillar of Pepper, your neighborhood brunch hub in North Fitzroy! We pride ourselves on serving delectable meals made with quality ingredients, lots of care and attention. Our scrumptious breakfast dishes are perfect for those days you find yourself in need of a good brunch near me or craving a premium cup of coffee from the local coffee shop near me.

​

At Pillar of Pepper, we believe in nourishing and sustaining our community with wholesome, delicious food. We pride ourselves in providing quality ingredients and cooking lovingly-made meals for our customers. We strive to make sure that each one of our dishes is crafted with local flair, so you can be sure you’re getting a unique and locally-sourced meal every time.

​

Our commitment to the local community doesn’t just stop at our food. We believe in contributing to the vibrancy and culture of North Fitzroy, which is why we organize various events like farmers markets, open mic nights and more. Our goal is to bring people together so that they can share stories, experiences and great food.

At Pillar of Pepper we understand the importance of connecting with our customers on a deeper level. We are constantly striving to improve our food, service and atmosphere so that everyone in North Fitzroy feels welcome and at home here. Our passion for quality ingredients and meals cooked with love drives us to go the extra mile for our customers.

​

We believe that locally-sourced ingredients are the key to creating dishes that pack a punch with their flavor. By sourcing our ingredients from local farmers and producers, we can guarantee the freshest produce and highest quality coffee beans—all of which contribute to meals that taste simply delicious.

​

When it comes to coffee, using locally-sourced beans is especially important. Local farmers are experts at selecting the best beans for flavor and aroma, so you can be sure that your cup of joe will always be of premium quality. Additionally, since local coffee beans don’t have to be transported long distances before brewing, they retain their flavor for longer periods of time. So when you sip on your cup of coffee, you can trust it’s the freshest and fullest-flavored option out there.

​

Our locally-sourced food is just as fresh and flavorful as our coffee. We select our ingredients from nearby growers in order to guarantee the best quality cooking experiences for our customers. Not only does this make for dishes that taste sensational, but it also supports our local community and keeps jobs in the neighborhood.

​

At Pillar of Pepper, we’re passionate about creating meals that are as fresh and delicious as they come. Our commitment to sourcing locally allows us to bring you a unique dining experience every time you visit us.

​

So, the next time you’re looking for a local brunch near me or a great cup of coffee from your favorite coffee shop near me, Stop by our cafe today

lan-coffee-thornbury:
Thoughtfully crafted, playfully delicious.At Flinch, we serve more than just great coffee — think seasonal flavours, fun drinks, and food that hits the spot without slowing you down. Whether you're grabbing a quick takeaway or settling in with friends, there's always something to enjoy. Don’t miss our rotating brunch specials too!👉 Want the full menu? Download here👇 Or browse some of our highlights below:

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 ☕Specialty Coffee

 

 

 
 Experience award-winning blends from Seven Miles Coffee Roasters.Cat’s Pyjamas: Smooth and rich. Classic daily choice.Wilde Blend: Gold Medal winner, with a fruity hint.Cold Brew: Refreshing and bold.Biscoff Latte: A sweet twist on a classic. Hot or Iced.Affogato: Double espresso over vanilla or coconut ice cream.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 🍵Matcha, Hojicha & Chai

 

 

 
 Warm up or cool down with our cosy, flavour-packed drinksMatcha Latte: Choose a lightly sweetened blend or 100% pure matchaHojicha Latte: Roasted green tea with a nutty depthChai Latte: Akardia spiced chai (powder) or loose-leaf masalaSpecialty Matcha Creations: Try our Strawberry Iced Matcha, Coconut Matcha Cloud, Taro, Earl Grey Matcha, Pistachio Matcha, and more.We source our matcha directly from a Japanese farm in Uji, Kyoto to guarantee peak freshness and quality in every sip.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 Soba Noodles & Japanese Curry

 

 

 
 Japanese-style dishes that suits different dietary requirements Soba Noodle Salad with flavourful toppings such as Grilled Chicken, Crispy Chicken, Teriyaki Crispy Tofu (vegan), Grilled Shrooms & Veg (vegan), Grilled Butter Prawns, or Tempura Prawns.Japanese curry with katsu chicken, tempura prawns or tofu (vegan) served with rice or noodles. Limited specials.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 🥞 Soufflé Pancakes

 

 

 
 Indulge in our signature fluffy Japanese soufflé pancakes - always gluten-free*Lemon Curd Berries & Cream: A delightful combination of tart and sweet.Big Brekkie: A savoury twist with egg, bacon, and hash brown, stacked on our signature soufflé base.Pandan Coconut: Light, fragrant pandan pancakes topped with whipped coconut cream and toasted coconut flakes.*Gluten-Free: All our pancake bases are gluten-free. Non-gluten free toppings include Oreos and Biscoff.

 The Espresso Room’s finer details... 
 
 
 
 Nestled a stone-throw north of Melbourne, The Espresso Room lives and breathes excellence in food and coffee. We are passionate about quality local produce, always sourcing the very best fresh food available. This, paired with excellent customer service is a pinnacle part of the Espresso Room experience.Sharing a coffee or a meal with family or friends is more than satiating your hunger, it’s also about feeding the soul. The word soon spread and there are now Jolly Miller cafés across the state offering quality barista made coffee, wholesome food and delicious pastries and the most delicious of homemade cakes.Over the years we’ve tinkered, tested and perfected our recipes so you can enjoy fresh, delicious, heart warming goodness everyday! We believe in... Freshly roasted, fairly sourced. Homemade from our kitchens. We use the very best ingredients. View our menusOrder online Our foodLike early birds in the morning we’re mixing, making and hand crafting our products to share with you each and every day.We take no shortcuts and craft our products using only the finest ingredients to deliver delicious, quality meals and treats for you. We believe there is no greater moment than sharing good honest food with someone you love.From a delicious breakfast, a hearty burger or any one of our decadent cakes we’ve got good honest food to make every moment memorable.  About

 The newly renovated Village Cafe radiates with vibrant energy and contemporary flair, establishing itself as an exceptional meeting spot.
Its trendy ambiance invites patrons to linger over conversations, while the aroma of freshly brewed coffee and the tantalizing array of dishes stimulate the senses.

 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
Eat

 
With an extensive array of delicious breakfast and lunch offerings, both available all throughout the day, we invite you to dine with us.
From mouthwatering mains to tempting sweets and a dedicated kids’ menu, there’s something to delight every taste bud. Savour the flavours of our diverse menu, crafted to ensure satisfaction from dawn till dusk.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
Drink

 
For a refreshing boost, explore our selection of rejuvenating juices crafted from the freshest ingredients.
As the day transitions, immerse yourself in conversation with a glass of fine wine or a crisp beer,
perfect for unwinding with friends or colleagues.

miss-lacey-cafe-and-wine-bar-croydon:
ABOUT MISS LACEY CAFE + WINE BARMiss Lacey Cafe + Wine Bar is a place for locals & visitors to call home. Whether you're coming for our delicious All Day Breakfast,  our delectable lunches, our locally roasted coffee or an afternoon vino and a charcuterie board. Our focus is on serving quality food, coffee and wine, and where possible using locally sourced produce.  

We believe in locals supporting locals.

​

We are open 7 days per week and located on the Corner of Lacey St & Main Street Croydon in the beautiful old "State Bank" building. Our passionate  team, will have you coming back time and time again. 

​

OPENING HOURS:

Monday - Friday: 7:30am - 3pm 

Saturday & Sunday - 8am - 3pm

(kitchen closes 2:30pm​)Why are we called Miss Lacey?Our cafe and wine bar is named after "Lacey St" which is the intersecting street upon which we sit.  The Lacey Family were actually one of the first families to inhabit the area from England. Gregory Lacey and his wife Sarah came to Australia in 1870 and in 1880 Gregory purchased 56 acres of land including the land that our Cafe sits on.  Gregory had the honour of naming the town, he decided to name it after his wife Sarah's home town in England "Croydon" as his home town "Steeple Bumpstead" did not have the best ring to it!

the-jolly-miller-cafe-caroline-springs: DINNER IN CRAIGIEBURN TUE – SAT FROM 4PMBook now FIND YOUR LOCAL LOCATIONS ORDER AHEAD Skip the Queue Download Now Craigieburn Now Open For DinnerBook now About usThe Jolly Miller story began in the early 1990s with a humble bakery patisserie in the small country town of Gisborne in Victoria’s Macedon Ranges. The word soon spread and there are now Jolly Miller cafés across the state offering quality barista made coffee, wholesome food and delicious pastries and the most delicious of homemade cakes.Over the years we’ve tinkered, tested and perfected our recipes so you can enjoy fresh, delicious, heart warming goodness everyday! We believe in... Freshly roasted, fairly sourced. Homemade from our kitchens. We use the very best ingredients. View our menusOrder online Our foodLike early birds in the morning we’re mixing, making and hand crafting our products to share with you each and every day.We take no shortcuts and craft our products using only the finest ingredients to deliver delicious, quality meals and treats for you. We believe there is no greater moment than sharing good honest food with someone you love.From a delicious breakfast, a hearty burger or any one of our decadent cakes we’ve got good honest food to make every moment memorable.  Lucchini Cakes & Cafe
 Established in 1952, Lucchini Cakes was the first Italian cake shop on Lygon Street in Carlton.
 In 1973, Lucchini Cakes established itself in High Street Preston(complete with bakery), and Stalls in the Preston Market.
 Today the business is still going strong with a focus on coffee and continental cakes. The business has a strong lunch and breakfast crowd, with filos, focaccias and piadinas particular lunch-time favourites with locals.

little-henri-thornbury:
Menu  Functions Delivery Contact Us 

MenuFunctionsDeliveryContact Us 

Facebook
 

Instagram
 

 

Welcome to Little Henri 

Born from our love of good coffee, fine food and the love to celebrate.Breakfast | Lunch | Functions 

Open 7 Days 

Facebook
 

Instagram
 

Little Henri is not really so little... 

but a rather spacious place built as a nod to the balance between old and new that Melbourne is so well known for.Little Henri pays tribute to local history in its name, settings, and design. 

 

Setting 

Right at the top end of High Street, at the junction of Dundas and High Streets and Plenty Road, look for a corner where little silhouettes of a boy run along the walls. Here, you have found Little Henri.Once inside, the space opens up like you wouldn’t expect from the street; high ceilings, a beautiful round counter , and a backyard that is just asking to be brunched in make this cafe unsuspectingly sizeable. 

 

 

Name 

Until 1994 Thornbury was a part of the lovely City of Northcote and, in a nod to that shared history, Little Henri is named after Sir Stafford Henry Northcote himself — or ‘Little Henri’, as we liked to call him.  He was the 3rd Governor-General of Australia (1903-1908)  and was dedicated to, and influenced Melbourne’s development and culture 

 

Design 

The cafe is a converted bank and still has the original safe door.  It’s exterior and interior reflects rustic and distressed finishes and yet is trendy, sleek and sophisticated in its simplistic design.An interior with deep textures complementing a mix of earthy furnishings combined with natural lighting, and an exterior of a covered courtyard as well as a large leafy open courtyard emanates a welcoming and relaxed ambiance. 

Little Henri 

Functions + Events 

Little Henri’s open and flowing spaces can accommodate a myriad of functions; from 3 course dinners for 60 people inside the main dining room or a contemporary, standing affair that takes in both our restaurant and the courtyards outside for 150 guests. A combination of both is a magical option, starting the night off with canapés and Champagne in the courtyard, followed by a selection of decadent mains & desserts to fill even the hungriest of guests. 

Enquire Now

Download Function Pack

 

 

 

 

 

Little Henri 

Virtual Tour 

 

Get in touch 

Address : 850 High Street, Thornbury 3071Phone : (03) 9484 8857Email : info@littlehenri.com.auEvent Booking : events@littlehenri.com.auWeb : www.littlehenri.com.au

STONEHOUSE       WARRANDYTECONTACT. MENU. INSTA.*MENU

Using local produce, STONEHOUSE Warrandyte prides itself on providing delicious homecooked meals that will satisfy your hunger, whilst treating your tastebuds. Serving an all-day breakfast and lunch menu accompanied by a fully-licensed bar menu, we offer a range of delicious meals for all. Whether it’s our famous Dukkah Eggs or local favourite Superfood Salad coupled with our in-house cold-press juices, STONEHOUSE is the perfect place for a quiet breakky with the family or weekly lunch gathering paired with a bottle of red with your friends. Set amongst the beautiful greenery and tranquil backdrop of Warrandyte bushlands, STONEHOUSE will be sure to add a moment of serenity into your day.

round-bird-cant-fly-lilydale:
MENU
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 GALLERY
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 BOOK A TABLE
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Round Bird is an iconic, long standing family run cafe and wine shop at the gateway to the Yarra Valley and Dandenong ranges.  Laura is the head chef of our little establishment, her husband Evan is on the coffee machine, and their young son Connor is often seen carrying coffees or food to tables, greeting guests and even making coffee’s with his dad.  Our dog, while absolutely beautiful, is also completely useless in a hospitality setting, so we leave her on our bed at home. Round Bird began with Laura and Evan in 2014, and since then has grown and changed as its owners and community have. The core of what we do is good, honest, hard working hospitality.  We are open 7 days a week for breakfast and lunch, serving high quality cafe fare as well as local wines to enjoy with your meal or take home.  On top of this we incorporate the Round Bird Artspace where we exhibit local artists, run kids art workshops, and even Paint & Sip events.  Our wine range has extended to include a boutique retail space focused again on local, small, independent wine makers.We look forward to serving you soon
locavore-cafe-lilydale:
LILYDALE · YARRA VALLEY

Yarra Valley Eatery & Providore in the Heart of Lilydale

Tucked inside an 1880s heritage building on Main Street, Locavore Studio serves the best of the Yarra Ranges. From slow brekkies and long lunches to a providore stocked with thoughtfully sourced local produce.

 
 
 

 View the menu
 

 Plan your visit
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

Serving Lilydale since

2015

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

A unique eatery and food store, offering the best produce of the Yarra Ranges & Yarra Valley 

The Locavore experience brings a collective of passionate foodies, coffee enthusiasts and hospitality professionals together to create something pretty special. Situated the lower end of Lilydale in a beautiful heritage building, built in the late 1880s, we offer a distinctive dining & food store experience. Thoughtfully curated local produce, coffee roasted onsite and professional service makes for a truely transformative dining experience.

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Cafe & Eatery

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Locavore Providore

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Catering

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Proximal Coffee Roasters

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

What we do at Locavore

Four ways to enjoy the best of the Yarra Valley — at the studio, at home, or at your next event.

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

Cafe & Eatery

Our café is a hub for food and coffee lovers! With our ever-changing seasonal menu, you’ll always have new things to try. We are excited to welcome you to our brand new eatery, embracing a casual, yet luxurious space to enjoy with your family and friends. You’ll find all the Locavore classics, along with new and improved dishes, coffee experiences and a delicious boozy offering. This space has been designed for you to enjoy slow mornings, boozy brunches, long lunches and after work cheese and charcuterie platters in the sunshine with a glass of local wine.

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

Proximal Coffee Roasters

We are so privileged to home the wonderful Proximal Coffee Roasters to Locavore. Proximal is run and operated by one of our OG Baristas, Evan Thompson. With a big focus on local sustainability and community, Evan is extremely respectful to the farmers from which he sources his coffee beans and acknowledges the life long dedication they have to their traditional farming history. The coffee Evan roasts is approachable, delicate and flavourful and has been our supplier for 4 years. We are very excited to watch this next journey Proximal has ahead, and welcome you to visit his roastery, located within our establishment.

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

Locavore Providore

Our beautifully stocked larder has everything you could need to throw the bestest dinner party. We have a thoughtfully curated selection of international and local cheeses, charcuterie & ingredients to make any pantry shine. Our knowledgeable staff are there to guide you through cooking up the most delectable tagine or perfecting that medium rare steak only dreams can be made of

chef-staceys-sandwich-bar-lilydale:
Join The Family
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 Our Food

 
 
 
 Each Sandwich Chefs store is inspired by traditional delis, where meat-filled, made-to-order sandwiches are served with love, and ‘delicious’ is the rule for all.
We’ve been taking sandwiches seriously for over thirty years, and in all that time, we’ve never once compromised on the good stuff. That means artisanal bread – the fresh, crusty, fluffy kind – and gourmet meats left to slow roast for 14 hours to juicy, crackly perfection.
Life is all about balance, that’s why we prepare our gourmet salads, wraps, juices and smoothies with the same amount of enthusiasm as that very first sandwich.
 
 
 
 
 
 All so we can bring real flavour and wholesome hunger busting fun to your morning breakfast and lunch-time breaks.
We’re the unlikely family you wish you were born into. Bound together by a good attitude and a healthy appetite for feeding others, we exist in almost 60 stores right around Australia, and we’re growing.
Better yet, we’re still not finished dreaming up new fillings, fresh flavours or big ideas.

espresso-3094-montmorency:
welcome toOur Café 
 
 
 
 Unwind & Indulge: Discover Espresso 3094’s Crafted Brunch & Lunch MenuCraving a delightful escape fuelled by exceptional food and warm hospitality? Look no further than Espresso 3094, your haven for curated brunch and lunch experiences in Montmorency.Step through our doors at 44 Were Street and discover a sanctuary designed for indulgence. Bask in the sunlight filtering through our spacious dining room or soak in the fresh air of our charming outdoor courtyard. Whether you’re catching up with loved ones, celebrating a special occasion, or simply seeking a moment of relaxation, Espresso 3094 provides the perfect setting.Our chef-driven menu celebrates the bounty of local, seasonal ingredients, transforming them into mouth-watering creations for every moment of your day. Start your morning right with innovative takes on timeless classics like fluffy buttermilk pancakes or our signature eggs Benedict. As the day progresses, embark on a culinary journey with our diverse lunch options, including:Freshly made pasta dishes in vibrant sauces with seasonal vegetables.Perfectly cooked fish of the day sourced from local markets.Acai bowls packed with superfoods and healthy toppings.Crisp and colourful salads featuring locally sourced greens, proteins and delightful dressings.And to truly elevate your experience, why not complement your meal with a glass of wine? We offer a carefully curated selection of local and international wines, allowing you to find the perfect pairing to enhance your culinary journey.No indulgence is complete without a touch of sweetness. Indulge in our selection of exquisite cakes and desserts, each a masterpiece of flavour and artistry crafted by our talented pastry chefs.Espresso 3094 is more than just a cafe; it’s a community hub where exceptional food, attentive service, and a welcoming atmosphere create lasting memories. Join us and discover why we’re a cherished Montmorency favourite, offering an experience that exceeds expectations. pierross-eltham:
Coffee, Cake and Pizza in Eltham
Treat yourself to a slice of Venice
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 By day, explore our delicious cakes, pastries and coffee. Thursday, Friday and Saturday nights, enjoy our venice-inspired cuisine and traditional wood fired pizza.
 
 View Our Menu
 
 Order Online
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Italian Café 
 Tue to Sat – 8.00am to 2.00pmSun – 8.00am to 12.00pm
Enjoy the flavours of Venice with our homemade sweets and pastries, handmade by Pier on the premises. Add to your experience by having one of our smooth coffees. Whether it is a frothy cappuccino, a skinny latte, or a strong macchiato, we will make it for you to enjoy.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Dinner
 Thu to Sat – 4.30pm till Late
 
We are especially known for our traditional homemade Italian pizza, cooked in a wood fired oven, with gluten free options and pasta available. Sit, relax and have a drink at our cosy cafe, located on Dudley Street in the Eltham Terrace, or order online and pick up for a night at home.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Take Away Pizza & Pasta
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Wood Fired Pizza
 
 
 
 
 
 Delight in an authentic Italian wood fired pizza, right here in Eltham. Pierross is our cosy Italian pizza cafe where we bring a slice of Venice to your plate. We take pride in preparing our home made dough, using the freshest ingredients, and using our in-store wood fired oven to create a delicious pizza for you.
You’ll find an enticing array of pizza creations that cater to all tastes and preferences. From the classic Margherita, with its vibrant tomato sauce, creamy mozzarella, and fragrant basil, to the adventurous Formaggi, with a tantalising blend of four mouthwatering cheeses, we have a pizza to satisfy every craving.
Jump online and order your pick-up.
 
 Order Online
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Pasta, Salad and Antipasto
 
 
 
 
 
 For those looking for something beyond pizza, we offer a selection of antipasti, salads, and traditional Italian pasta dishes. Indulge in our antipasto platter with cured meats, marinated vegetables, and delicious cheeses. Our pasta dishes are a celebration of the rich culinary heritage of Italy, crafted with care and attention to detail.
Every dish is prepared to bring out the flavours and textures that define Italian cusine. Our commitment to quality and authenticity comes through in every bite. Jump online and order your pick-up.
 
 Order Online
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 About Pierross
Pierross started in January 2011 after moving from Italy.
It is the place where people can have the great taste of Italian homemade food, sip smooth coffee and feel spoilt savouring a cake made on the premises.
Owner and chef, Pier, says that Pierross is the ‘little Italian corner’ (the shop is in a corner of Eltham Terrace), where ev
picketts-melbourne-airport: Home PICKETT’S DELIIn December 2019, Melbourne based chef and restaurateur Scott Pickett brought his Queen Victoria Market concept, which he originally opened in 2016, to terminal three – opening Pickett’s Deli & Rotisserie in the former P. J. O’Brien’s space. Take a seat at the communal table or in a booth…watch the rotisserie turn, and enjoy a selection of snacks and dishes showcasing Victorian produce at it’s best.The all-day eatery serves as the ideal pit-stop for an early morning coffee, breakfast, eat in or takeaway lunch or dinner, also offering cocktails and wines by the glass.Take a piece of the deli away with you with something from our retail range.“I’m looking forward to giving travellers a true taste of the quality of Melbourne food, from our house cured and smoked bacon, slow roasted overnight and carved to order; for dishes such our much-loved bacon and egg buttie, to our roast chicken coated in our secret rub in delicious baguettes. tancks-corner-yarrambat:
COFFEE  |  LIVING  |  POST
 
 Order Online
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Locally Sourced. Beautifully Served.
 
 
 
 
 
 At Tancks, we take pride in sourcing fine, Australian made and farmed produce from local suppliers and various other small businesses around Victoria.
From our delicious Portuguese Tarts and Almond Croissants made by Noisette, a fifth-generation boulangerie that has specialised in traditional French baking since 1825; to our farm-fresh, free-range eggs sourced by local Villa Verde egg merchants; right down to the Meredith goat’s feta we use in our famous ‘Shrooms and Greens’ and Smashed Av.
Every single ingredient on our menu has been carefully selected for its unique texture and flavour. We don’t take shortcuts, so the end result is always the same – spectacularly produced food with a whole lot of heart.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Tanck’s Crowd Favourites
Food is the universal language of love…. so why not make it EXTRAORDINARY!
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 The Buttermilk Burger
 Buttermilk Fried Sesame Chicken on Brioche Bun w/ Crispy Slaw, Cheese, Spring Onions, Coriander & Sriracha Mayo, served w/ our legendary House-Made Onion Rings on side
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Tanck Smash
 Just-cut Avocado, Danish Fetta, Poached Egg, Toasted Pepita, House Beetroot Relish & Lemon Wedge on Multigrain Toast
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Ricotta Hotcakes
 Deliciously Hot Berry Compote w/ Seasonal Berries & Vanilla Bean Mascarpone
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Order Online
 
 SEE OUR DINE-IN MENU
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 THE HISTORY OF TANCK’S CORNER
 
 
 
 
 
 Yarrambat, originally known as Tanck’s Corner, was the home of two significant gold rushes – one before 1860 and the other after 1900. Not enough gold was found to create a thriving township however, and so the town was primarily established by Selectors.
One such Selector was Frederick Tanck. Tanck owned several properties on the north site of Ironbark Road. In fact, the T-intersection where Ironbark Road meets Yan Yean Road was once known as Tanck’s Corner after the man himself! 
In 1929, the name of the town was officially changed to what we now know and love as Yarrambat. While the reason for the name change is unknown, Yarrambat is an Indigenous word that means “high hills” or “pleasant views” – something we get to experience and appreciate every day.

 Our StoryAt Andreas, we believe great food starts with real experience, honest ingredients, and a love for sharing it all.Led by our Head Chef with over 40 years of experience in the hospitality industry, every dish is guided by tradition and elevated with refined, modern touches.From slow-cooked classics to buttery French crêpes and café staples done right — we believe the simplest dishes, when made with heart, can be unforgettable.Our pastries are baked fresh. Our desserts are indulgent and elegant. Our signature hot dishes are made to comfort and impress. Whether you're here for a long lunch or grabbing a coffee and cake on the go — Andreas is an experience.This is a space where locals gather, conversations linger, and every guest is treated like family. Because for us, food isn’t just food — it’s our way of welcoming you in.

Bagels
 
 A tradition for over 50 years. The Glick's name is synonymous with the best bagels in Melbourne. Choose from a wide range of varieties and seed toppings and enjoy with your favourite fillings
 
 
 
 
 Catering
 
 The great taste of Glick's delivered to your office or home! Choose from a selection of bagels, sandwiches or wraps with a range of delicious toppings, plus speciality platters, pastries & more
 
 
 
 
 Challahs
 
 Whether gracing the table on Friday night, sliced for french toast on Sunday morning or delicious sandwiches, our golden challahs are famous for their incredible flavour and light, fluffy texture
 
 
 
 
 Artisan Bread
 
 Our superb range of artisan breads, baguettes and rolls are hand-crafted daily with the signature quality and fresh flavour that you expect from Glick's. Savour the tastes and aromas of Europe any time.
 
 
 
 
 Sliced Bread
 
 Perfect for school and work lunches so the whole family can enjoy the famous taste of Glick's plain, wholemeal and rye breads any time, anywhere. Pick up a bag of your favourite bread in store today.
 
 
 
 
 Pastries

hello-sparrow-cafe-126a-chapel-street:
H E L L O  S P A R R O W 

 

 

 
 St Kilda Cafe

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Hello Sparrow welcomes you to our home away from home. We believe that food is a universal language that transcends boundaries bringing people together in a shared experience of taste, culture and connection. 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 CRAFTED IN THE KITCHENThis menu was created to embrace the art of wholesome dining, curating a culinary journey that promotes both flavour and fuel for the body. In saying that, everybody loves a big dirty breakfast every now and then.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 FRESH INGREDIENTSOnly the best of the best makes its way into our kitchen. Its as simple as this, “The best flavours come from the freshest produce".”

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 THE CHEFThe menu is created by Chef Tj. Crafting his style of food from the small nooks of Auckland City, then taking over Queenstown for a number of years before residing right here in St. Kilda. 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 View Menu
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Hello Sparrow Café in St Kilda
 

Discover the Charm of St Kilda at Hello Sparrow Cafe

At Hello Sparrow, nestled in the vibrant streets of St Kilda, we believe in providing not just a meal, but an experience. Our cafe, a harmonious blend of modern comforts and the classic allure of St Kilda, offers you the perfect spot to unwind, connect, and indulge.

Indulge in Our Handcrafted Culinary Delights
Our menu, crafted with passion and precision, features a variety of dishes that cater to every taste. From freshly baked pastries to heartwarming coffees, each item on our menu is a testament to our commitment to quality and flavor. As a standout cafe in St Kilda, we source our ingredients locally, ensuring every bite is fresh and delightful.

Your Ideal Spot for Every Occasion
Whether it's a quick coffee on the go, a leisurely brunch with friends, or a cozy afternoon reading your favorite book, Hello Sparrow is the place to be. Our friendly staff, warm ambiance, and exceptional service make every visit memorable.

Events and Gatherings at Hello Sparrow
Looking for the perfect venue in St Kilda for your next event? Hello Sparrow offers a charming space for private parties, corporate events, or casual get-togethers. Let us make your event special with our personalized service and exquisite menu.

Join Our Community
Follow us on social media to stay updated on our latest offers and events. Join the Hello Sparrow family and be a part of our journey in the heart

odd-spot-cafe-shop-1302-melbourne-road:
About us
 
 Hello, and welcome to our quicky little cafe right here in Melbourne. We’re the Odd Spot Cafe and we’re passionate about preparing fresh, wholesome and healthy dishes for our loved guests, but don’t worry we don’t compromise on the flavour! We know Melbourne locals are passionate about their coffee and we promise our baristas have got you covered. We also offer freshly made juices, healthy smoothies as well as tasty food that we’re really proud of. You’ll find our little spot on Melbourne Road in Newport, not too far from the beautiful Yarra River, so pop in and pay us a visit, we look forward to meeting you!

jimmy-the-saint-15-87-gladstone-street:
Gourmet Breakfast
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 Flavours of late harvest grapes and brandied fruits
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 THE SAINT
 Tucked beneath a renovated office building in Gladstone Street, South Melbourne sits Jimmy The Saint, a cafe feeding and caffeinating business folk and locals.
 Built with old-fashioned style, the cafe is decked-out with all the appropriate trimmings, from the vintage petrol pump in the corner and stools made from old drums of Mansion Wax Polish to the refurbished ceiling lamps made from those once used to peer under car hoods. There’s even a mini Michelin man to top things off.
 The menu is simple yet thoughtful and offers breakfast and lunch fare to devour alongside juice or coffee (St. Ali). Choose from eggs with soldiers, ricotta pancakes with fruit labne and mascarpone, or a trio of arancini with napoli and parmesan. Good luck trying to leave without a piece of homemade slice or a lolly bag.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 THE FOOD
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 SEE OUR DISPLAY CABINET FOR MORE FRESH AND TASTY OPTIONS.ASK ABOUT OUR MILKSHAKES, THICKSHAKES, ICE-CREAM SODAS AND MILO.
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 THE LOCATION
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 15 GLADSTONE STREET
 SOUTH MELBOURNE, VIC 3205
 TEL: 03 9686 1888
 EMAIL: jimmythesaintcafe@gmail.com

Specialty Coffee x Gourmet Sandwiches

We created Philoçoffee Espresso Bar as a place where you can enjoy great coffee and gourmet sandwiches. 

our story

Philoçoffee

We first opened our door back in 2014, with the mission to serve great specialty coffee and delicious gourmet sandwiches to residents and executives living and working in South Melbourne and surrounds.

12 years on, we are one of the longest standing cafes on Albert Road, South Melbourne – serving coffees that we carefully roast for you, and insisting in making you gourmet sandwiches daily from freshly delivered bread.

Specialty Coffee

Gourmet Sandwiches

Yes, We Cater!

Our gourmet sandwiches are also available for your get-togethers – whether it is to power your office meetings or to help you say “thank you” to your clients, we’ve got you covered.

COFFEE At its heart, coffee is not just a drink – It's a community. From the farmers who carefully tend the plants to the roasters who coax out the beans' rich flavors, every step of the process is infused with care and dedication. And when you take that first sip of a perfectly crafted cup, you're not just enjoying a beverage – you're connecting with people from all around the world who've poured their hearts and souls into creating something truly special. That's what SMALL BATCH understands so well, and why we've remained faithful to their coffee since day one. Because when you have a shared vision of excellence, every cup becomes a celebration of the people and stories that make it possible.

 The Western Brew 
 
 Welcome to The Western Brew, your neighbourhood breakfast and brunch spot nestled in the heart of Kingsville, Melbourne since 2021.
Harry is the wonderful owner of The Western Brew since 2022, bringing his passion for great food, warm hospitality, and community spirit into everything we do. Under his care, The Western Brew has become a vibrant local hub where every guest feels like part of the family.
We believe great food is best enjoyed in good company. That’s why our space is bright, welcoming, and dog-friendly, making it the perfect place to gather with friends, family, or even your furry companions.
At The Western Brew, we’re passionate about offering all-day breakfast and lunch so you can enjoy your favourites whenever the craving hits. We also provide catering services to bring our signature flavours to your special occasions and workplace events.
Come join us, and experience what makes The Western Brew the heart of Kingsville’s brunch scene.

east-melbourne-general-store-53-hotham-s:
ABOUT USThe East Melbourne General Store is your local store.
East Melbourne's favourite bottleshop, cafe and grocery store. Conveniently catering for all your everyday essentials and stocking an extensive range of specialty goods. Here you can find everything for life's emergencies as well as those last minute gifts and treats.

​

For over 150 years, the site of East Melbourne General Store has been servicing its local community. It was first built as The Emerson Dairy in 1862. Mrs. Emerson lived out back and later added groceries to trade until 1910. This Hotham St corner store has remained a family run grocery store ever since, loosing its original bluestone building to the current structure in 1978. Since then not much has changed. We're still selling daily bread & milk, lolly bags, hot pies and milkshakes with an 'old school' level of service and kindness.AboutWe stock locally produced and ecologically friendly products, with a range of deluxe imported gift lines and gourmet produce, specialty bottleshop and fruit and vegetables.

​

The East Melbourne General Store is one of Melbourne's last remaining Milk Bars and a great place to see if visiting East Melbourne or new to the neighbourhood. Come and meet the locals, catch up on community news or lounge around with a coffee out front.

​

We hope you will continue to support our General Store so it can remain an icon of East Melbourne for 150 years more.

​

We look forward to serving you.Visit our StoreProductsMILK BAR CAFEAll your favourite milkshakes, custard tarts, slices, toasties, hot pies and sandwiches.

migrant-coffee-3576-barkly-street:
Brunchin' and Lunchin'
 
 Come Through Fam
 
 OPENING HOURS
 
 
 
 
 
 
 For Us By Us
 
 We Are the Westside
 
 SHOW LOVE
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 ANDREW & BRENDA LY - THE NEXT CHAPTER
 
 
 
 
 We're both raised in the West by hardworking Chinese Vietnamese families who taught us that the best moments in life happen around food, conversation and community. Growing up, we watched our parents welcome people in, share what they had and make everyone feel at home. We’ve always loved hosting, cooking and bringing people together, so hospitality has always felt like a natural fit for us. For us, food has always been at the centre of everything. It's how our families show love and stay connected. Coffee has consistently held that same meaning for us. It’s never just a drink. It’s a pause. It’s a catch-up. It’s time spent with the people who matter. Brenda has lived in West Footscray her whole life, and with our home and family close by and a baby on the way, it means so much to us to contribute to the community that raised us. Stacey and Melodee have created something truly special - not just a café, but a community home filled with stories. We feel honoured that they’ve trusted us to continue that legacy. Our goal is to listen, learn, and build this next chapter together with the community and our amazing team. We’re so excited for what’s ahead and can’t wait to share good food and coffee and continue the Migrant Coffee story.
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 Your Fave Westside Coffee & Bagels
 
 Open Thursday to Tuesday

thieves-coffee-36-38-kerr-street:
September 04, 2025
 
 Share
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Three Egg Scram
 
We’ve had a chat with Steve Chan, the creative mind behind Sleepy’s Cafe & Wine Bar in Carlton North. Steve’s not your typical chef – he’s part barista, part wine maestro, and an all-around hospitality human.
Steve turned what started as a “just somebody had to do it” career move into something extraordinary. After hopping over from Sydney to Melbourne with nothing but a suitcase and café resume – he quickly fell for the city’s café culture and stayed. 
Follow Sleepy's on insta to keep up with their cohort of pop up events, great coffee and great food. (@sleepyscafeandwinebar)

The Interview
Why did you decide to share this dish?
This dish is a banger. I’m inherently a glutton, but I’m also pretty lazy – and this ticks both boxes. On one hand, it’s super easy to make, and most people have had some version of it before. But with a few extra touches: like a good chilli oil, your favourite spice mix, or lap cheong (Chinese sausage) – it really comes to life. Those little additions elevate it, tickle the taste buds, and even fire off a few neurons.
Go-to breakfast dish?
Here’s the thing… I’m not really a breakfast person. But if I do have breakfast, it has to involve caffeine and eggs. Two eggs, six eggs… even 24 eggs! Eggs in some capacity for me is a staple of breakfast. If I’m out, I’m partial to poached eggs on toast, maybe with avocado. If I’m feeling fancy, smashed avo. But, overall I’m a simple guy: caffeine + eggs = happy.
Any tips for the recipe?
My tip is not to stress. Seriously… this dish is stress-free cooking at its best. For example, in this recipe, if you fold the eggs too quickly or too late, the texture won’t be quite right. But when you nail it? It’s like Goldilocks – just right. Take your time, get into the groove, and cook in a way that makes you happy. Everyone likes their eggs a little differently, so focus on creating the texture you love. I’m a big believer in the beauty of “elevated simplicity.”
How does this dish remind you of your Dad?
Growing up, I think everyone’s had some form of eggs on toast. For me, it’s a nostalgic, easy, and comforting dish. But on special days like Father’s Day, you want to add a bit of extra flair. My dad has always loved Chinese sausage – he’d only ever get it if he ordered special fried rice from a Chinese takeaway, which was rare. And let’s be honest, the best part of that dish is the sausage. So adding it to my version of eggs on toast? That’s my little nod to him – same same, but different.

 
THE RECIPE
Ingredients - 
BreadLap Cheong (Chinese Sausage)Chilli OiSalt 3 Eggs 
Method

Toast your bread and remember to butter it when finished.

Cut up some slices of lap cheong. Diagonal cuts are the best because it gives you more surface area.

Scramble three eggs with a pinch of salt and a glug of chilli oil. If you like spicy food add some chilli flakes too!

Chuck your lap cheong on a pan and turn the heat up to medium high. Once

Poyntons Boulevard Café is situated high on the hill overlooking the picturesque Maribyrnong River in Essendon, serving quality food, made in house by our team.

 Perfect for a catch up with friends, a family day out or simply no reason at all. 

We're open for All day breakfast & lunch, with a seasonally inspired menu. Our extensive menu offers something for everyone, from light meals to something more hearty, or perhaps just a glass of wine or coffee & cake. We also have a great kid's menu.

ceres-grocery-bakery-and-cafe-roberts-st:
CERES Grocery 
 
 
 
 Nestled within the community park on top of the hill, overlooking the Honey Lane Market Garden is the CERES Grocery and Bakery, offering a unique, urban farm shopping experience in inner suburban Melbourne. 
 
 
 
 The CERES Grocery is a fresh organic fruit and vegetable grocery providing locally grown food, organic products and bulk foods with a focus on sustainability and local producers. There is also a bakery and Cafe nestled within the Grocery. The delicious organic sourdough is baked fresh every morning, using unique heirloom and ancient grains that are easy on sensitive stomachs, and that support biodiversity. The cafe also serves fresh pastries, sandwiches and other goodies, as well as barista coffees and teas. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 CERES Bakery bread available to purchase online through CERES Fair Food.Weekends at the GroceryEvery weekend you can find bands playing from 10.30am-12.30pm and the CERES Market on the first and third Saturday of each month. Have a cuppa and a croissant whilst the band belts out some tunes and meet the local craft producers who sell their wares. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Some of our products at the Grocery include:
 
 
 
 
 Honey Lane-grown herbs and veggies (walked right up the hill)
 
 
 
 
 Organic bulk foods, including flours, dried fruits, nuts, and pulses
 
 
 
 
 Organic chocolate, gluten-free biscuits, and other sweet treats
 
 
 
 
 Bulk, Earth-friendly cleaning products
 
 
 
 
 Chemical-free toiletries and natural skincare
 
 
 

 
 
 Refillable C02 cylinders for at-home fizzing (Fair Fizz)
 
 
 
 

 
 
 Soft Plastic Pick-Up bags and collection point
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 At the Bakery & Cafe you can find:
 
 
 
 
 Delicious barista coffee 
 
 
 
 
 Fresh homemade sandwiches
 
 
 
 
 Organic croissants and pastries baked every morning 
 
 
 
 
 Cakes and sweet treats
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 contact 
 
 
 
 Organic Grocery open:Mon – Fri9am-5pmWeekends9am-4pm
Grocery Cafe open:Everyday9am-3:30pm
Corner of Roberts & Stewart Streets, Brunswick East, VIC 3057
Call (03) 9389 0122
[email protected] 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 CERES Fair Food delivers organic fruit and veg 6 days a week. Order by 7pm for next day delivery.

baketico-by-wonder-pies-brunswick-75-nic:
Bake. Eat. Repeat.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 Find Your Closest Store
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 The Daily Bake.Baketico are artfully curated bakeri and larder stores that offer Raymond Capaldi’s renowned Wonder Pies, as well as artisanal breads, handmade sweets by Nana Fraser’s Neighbourhood Bakery and delicious locally sourced grab-and-go deli produce, as well as a hearty and delicious pasta range that will rival Nana’s cooking.

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 Baketico Brunswick at 75 Nicholson Street, which is also the home of our city-based Wonder Pies Factory Outlet.
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 
 Think of us as your dream neighbour – warm, welcoming, and always with a range of treats on offer when you drop in and say hello. Melbourne-made and operated, with a dedication to local suppliers and Australian-made products, each Baketico store is locally focused and community driven, with a commitment to creating quality hand-crafted pastries, grab-and-go produce and sweet treats.There are now four stores across Melbourne, thoughtfully placed from north to south to ensure you’re always close to an expertly brewed coffee or Melbourne’s best-voted sausage roll.We hope you enjoy our food as much as we love making it – whether it’s breakfast, lunch, afternoon tea or dinner, we’ve here for you.

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 The Airstreams Hit the Road.We’re very excited to share that our shiny Airstream food trailers are on the road to bring Baketico to the people. These silvery bullets offer all the usual crowd favourites and showcase some of our newest products under development.If you need delicious food curated for your next event, jump over to the contact form and let’s talk!

Our Story 
 
 
 
 For decades the corner block at 347 Reynard St was familiar to locals as Emil and Houda El-Khoury’s milk bar, where they just happened to raise six children in a two-bedroom house out the back.With a fresh perspective from the next generation, the family business has evolved from a traditional corner Milk Bar to Emil’s Café which now boasts a revamped dining space offering a delightfully array of breakfast, brunch and lunch options, complemented by a charming courtyard.

 Elevate your coffee break with FOODRINKS UNO, an innovative and delicious alternative to traditional metal or plastic spoons. These crunchy, edible teaspoons are crafted from premium shortcrust pastry, specifically designed to accompany coffee, desserts, and ice creams. Each 3.5g wafer provides a subtle sweet crunch, making it the perfect final bite for any treat.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 The FOODRINKS UNO Shortcrust Pastry Spoon is a unique gourmet accessory that blends functionality with indulgence. Designed for those who appreciate the finer details of a coffee or dessert experience, these spoons offer a sustainable and delicious “zero-waste” solution for stirring and snacking.
Premium Texture & Shape: Each spoon is a sturdy yet crumbly wafer of shortcrust pastry, measuring approximately 6cm long and 2cm wide at its largest point. Its ergonomic shape allows for light stirring of hot beverages or scooping of soft textures.
Versatile Pairings: While ideal for a morning espresso or cappuccino, these edible spoons are also perfect for serving with:
Gelato and Sorbet: Use them as a crunchy accompaniment to cold treats.

410 Station St, Thornbury VIC 3071Here we are!

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

Our brunch menu features flavours from Mexico and Southern California. Think Huevos Rancheros, Pulled Pork Tortas and our signature Breakfast Burritos. Our menu is always vegan and gluten free friendly! We source our produce from local suppliers, including free range eggs, chicken and pork.

Boozy brunch? We have you covered with a selection of Mexican beers, Margaritas, Micheladas and Mimosas! We also stock a range of seasonal artisan Tequila and Mezcal for special occasions.

We serve up delicious coffee from Belafonte, Wood & Co. and El Parche.

Sweet tooth? Alongside our own in house baking, we also stock pastries from Publique, Butter Mafia gluten free treats and the cult Butterbing cookie sandwiches. Staff favourite? Our brownie made with Birdsnake chocolate wins everytime.CafeThe BodegaWe stock booze, hotsauce, coffee beans and jams and other goodies from local and imported suppliers.

Pop by to see our current selection and follow us on Instagram to keep up to date with our newest additions.BOOK NOWVIEW MENU

 About Soulsoul Soulsoul opened in December 2019 and has become a staple in the heart of Melbourne's CBD. 

 Soulsoul balances spice, sweet, sour and salty to perfection on a range of Asian-inspired comfort dishes.

Whether you want to start your day with locally roasted coffee, an oat milk matcha latte or a cold-pressed juice, Soulsoul has you covered. Sit back and enjoy your beautiful dishes in the calming and relaxing shades of eggshell blue, mint green and colorful bright patterns.

Our staff have been hand-picked for their playful and down-to-earth nature and make sure to give you personalized attention during your visit.
